title: Finance Assistant (Spreadsheet-Focused) Global E-commerce Jewelry Brand
description:
Finance Assistant (Spreadsheet-Focused)

Global E-commerce Jewelry Brand



We are looking for a Finance Assistant with strong spreadsheet skills who wants to work at the core of a fast-growing global e-commerce company.



This role is focused on supporting daily financial operations while using spreadsheets as your main tool to keep everything accurate, structured, and under control.



You will work with real financial data across payment processors, banks, advertising platforms, and suppliers. Your work directly impacts how well the company understands its numbers and makes decisions.



If you are detail-oriented, structured, and comfortable working with data, this is a strong opportunity to build real experience in e-commerce finance.



What You Will Be Responsible For



Daily Financial Tracking



* Record and organize:

  Sales

  Refunds

  Chargebacks

  Advertising spend

  Cost of goods sold

  Operational expenses



Payout Tracking



* Maintain the payout tracker across multiple payment processors

* Track payout statuses and timelines

* Record fees, deductions, and adjustments



Transaction Verification



* Cross-check financial data between:

  Bank accounts

  Payment processors

  Internal records

* Identify and flag inconsistencies



Reconciliation



* Reconcile payouts and transactions across platforms

* Ensure all financial data is complete and accurate



Payables Tracking



* Track vendor payments

* Track advertising spend and outstanding balances



Monthly Analysis & Reporting



* Analyze:

  Processor fees

  Platform charges

  Payout summaries



* Support preparation of:

  Profit & Loss

  Cash Flow

  Balance tracking



Data Accuracy



* Identify errors or missing data

* Investigate differences and resolve them

* Improve spreadsheet structure over time



Requirements



* Experience as a Finance Assistant, Bookkeeper, or similar role



* Strong skills in Excel or Google Sheets



* Comfortable with:

  SUMIFS

  VLOOKUP / XLOOKUP

  Basic financial calculations



* High attention to detail



* Structured and organized way of working



* Strong sense of responsibility with financial data



* Able to work independently and handle repetitive tasks accurately



* Willing to learn and improve



Nice to Have (Not Required)



* Experience with e-commerce or online businesses

* Experience with payment processors (Shopify Payments, PayPal, etc.)

* Basic understanding of financial reporting



What This Role Offers



* Work inside a global e-commerce operation

* Gain hands-on experience with real financial flows

* Learn how financial operations work across multiple platforms

* Grow into more advanced roles in:

  Finance Operations

  Financial Analysis

  E-commerce Finance



This role is ideal for someone who is strong with spreadsheets and wants to apply those skills in a real finance environment with real impact.



Apply here:

[
](
)

title: [URGENT] $50 Per Sale - US Fiber Infrastructure Outreach (Government-Backed)
description:
Job Description:

Poyo Group LLC is looking for 2-3 elite outbound "hunters" for a long-term US telecom project. We are transitioning American businesses from old, insecure copper lines to 2-Gig Fiber.



Why this is an easy close for you:

There is a mandatory US push to move businesses to fiber by 2028. Because of this, the state is covering the installation costs and the first 2 months for the business.



You aren't selling. You are updating them on their eligibility.



NO Credit Cards required from the customer.



NO Contracts.



Free 60-Day Trial.



Compensation:



$50.00 USD per successful installation.



Paid weekly via Wise or Direct Deposit.



Top reps can easily hit 5+ installs per week ($250/week) once they master the script.



The Mission:

The old copper lines are physically degrading and unsecure. Your job is to call business owners, explain the 2028 infrastructure mandate, and get them enrolled in the 60-day pilot program so they can test the speed for themselves.



Requirements:



Excellent, clear English (No thick accents).



Must have a noise-canceling headset and backup power (no power outage excuses).



Willing to work US EST hours.



How to Apply:



Send a link to a 30-second voice recording. No recording = No interview.



Tell me about your experience with US Cold Calling.

title: Social Media Growth Manager (Content + Community + Meta Ads + Reporting)
description:
Job Title



Social Media Growth Manager (Content + Community + Meta Ads + Reporting)



Overview



We’re hiring a reliable Social Media Growth Manager to run day-to-day social execution across a small portfolio of UK brands:

 • Medica Universal (GP-led healthcare + weight loss) - Medica.Universal (IG)

 • Rosetta Property Company (UK property investment + HMOs + short-term rentals) - RosettaProperties (IG)

 • Dr Perminder (personal brand content: health, business, and leadership)

 • Moonstar Media (creative/content brand supporting video, storytelling, and production)



This is an execution role with clear SLAs. You will work in ClickUp, follow workflows, publish consistently, and report weekly. You will also repurpose SEO blogs into newsletters and social assets.



Hours (UK time)



10 hours/week to start, with fixed daily cover windows required.

Hours are expected to increase over the next 2–3 months if performance is strong.



Pay



Base: $4/hr

Performance add-ons available (based on outputs, reliability, KPIs, and growth metrics)



Non-Negotiables

 • ClickUp is the source of truth (no WhatsApp-only working)

 • Weekly output targets and reporting are mandatory

 • Clear communication and reliability are essential



Core Responsibilities

 1. Content execution + scheduling



 • Build and maintain a weekly content plan

 • Schedule and publish posts across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn (and other platforms as assigned)

 • Keep a clean content calendar with deadlines and approvals



 2. Community management + engagement



 • Respond to comments and DMs within agreed response windows

 • Use templates/SOPs to follow up leads and move them to booking/enquiry steps



 3. Meta Ads support (important)



 • Set up and manage basic Meta campaigns (lead form + traffic + retargeting) OR support and coordinate ads delivery if you are not fully advanced

 • Track spend, leads, CPL, and outcomes

 • Report performance weekly with clear next steps



 4. Repurposing workflow (important)



 • Convert approved SEO blogs into:

 • newsletters 
 format)

 • carousels (6–10 slides)

 • short captions and posts

 • Follow our templates and workflow (brief ? draft ? approval ? schedule ? report)



 5. Weekly reporting



 • Submit a weekly report every Friday (what shipped + metrics + what’s next)



SLAs (must agree)

 • ClickUp updates: every assigned task must have “Next step + ETA” (no reactions-only updates)

 • Response time: acknowledge messages within 24 hours on working days (within cover windows faster)

 • Weekly deliverables:

 • content plan posted in ClickUp by Monday 12pm UK

 • minimum 5-10 posts scheduled/published per week (platform split agreed)

 • engagement log updated

 • weekly report by Friday 5pm UK



Tools you must use

 • ClickUp (task management)

 • Google Drive (assets/SOPs)

 • Meta Business Suite

Bonus: Canva, Mailchimp/Klaviyo (or similar), basic analytics



Application Instructions (important)



Start your application with the word: Workflow



Include:

 1. Confirmation you accept $4/hr base + performance add-ons

 2. Your fixed weekly availability in UK time (must include daily cover windows)

 3. Two examples of accounts/content you managed (links)

 4. Meta Ads experience: Yes/No. If yes, include results (spend, leads, CPL, ROAS if applicable)



Answer these 3 questions:

A) How would you turn an SEO blog into (1) a newsletter and (2) a 6-slide carousel?

B) What does your weekly report include (exact headings)?

C) Confirm you will work in ClickUp and follow SLAs (Yes/No)



Applications without “Workflow” will not be considered.

title: Quality Assurance Specialist (Home Health)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and experienced Clinical Documentation & Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist to support our Home Health Agency. The ideal candidate must have a strong knowledge of clinical documentation, home health regulations, and quality standards (OASIS, CMS, CoPs). This role ensures accuracy, compliance, and completeness of all patient records and supports the agency in delivering high-quality care.



Key Responsibilities

1. Clinical Documentation Review

Review all clinical notes (SN, PT, OT, ST, MSW, HHA) for accuracy, completeness, and compliance.

Ensure documentation reflects medical necessity, skilled services, and the Plan of Care (POC).

Audit OASIS assessments for accuracy and congruency with patient condition and visit notes.

Ensure timely submission of documentation per agency standards.



2. Chart Audits & Compliance

Conduct routine chart audits for SOC, Recertification, ROC, Transfers, and Discharges.

Ensure all required documents are present (physician orders, consents, supplemental orders, POCs).

Monitor visit frequency, discipline coordination, and regulatory timelines.

Identify deficiencies and provide corrective action guidance.



3. Quality Improvement Activities

Participate in the agency’s QAPI program.

Track and analyze QA metrics (infections, hospitalizations, falls, adverse events, missed visits).

Assist in identifying trends and implementing improvement plans.



4. Staff Education & Support

Support clinicians with documentation, POC, orders, and compliance-related questions.



5. Coordination & Communication

Collaborate with the care team and administrative staff to ensure alignment with QA standards.

Communicate QA findings professionally with recommendations for correction.

Follow up to ensure timely completion of revisions and updates.



6. Other Duties

Assist with preparation for state surveys and accreditation visits.

Review and update QA-related policies and procedures.

Participate in case conferences as needed.



Monthly Rate: P18,000 starting



Equipment:

• Laptop or desktop computer

• Stable internet connection

• Webcam

• Headset/earphones



If you are passionate about accurate documentation, quality care, and supporting a high-performing healthcare team, we encourage you to apply.



Kindly submit your resume with the subject title “Home Health QA”.

Send your application to:

title: Full-Time Remote Bookkeeper
description:
We are seeking a highly meticulous and proactive Remote Bookkeeper to join our team on a full-time basis. This role is critical to our financial health and requires an individual who thrives on precision, operational oversight, and forward-thinking financial management.



The successful candidate will work within the EST Time Zone and will be responsible for ensuring the absolute integrity of our financial records while providing actionable insights to management.



Key Responsibilities and Non-Negotiables

Financial Accuracy and Attention to Detail

Verify all incoming invoices and approve bills with 100?curacy.



Ensure all ledger entries are correct; errors in cash flow or budget tracking are considered unacceptable.



Conduct regular reconciliations to maintain "audit-ready" books at all times.



Budget Management and Reporting

Track individual project budgets and monitor daily expenses against set limits.



Proactively alert management the 
nt spending exceeds or is projected to exceed established thresholds.



Generate clear, comprehensive, and timely reports regarding project-specific budgets and overall company cash flow.



Cash Flow Forecasting

Maintain a rolling 2-week forecast of upcoming payments and cash requirements.



Identify and flag potential shortfalls or liquidity issues well before they impact operations.



Proactivity and Operational Oversight

Actively monitor transactions beyond simple data entry (e.g., verifying that deposits have cleared and payments were processed successfully).



Take full initiative to resolve discrepancies and financial hurdles without requiring constant supervision.



Technical Proficiency

Demonstrate expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online, QuickBooks Desktop, and Xero.



Exhibit strong digital literacy in managing financial data and preparing complex digital reports.



Communication and Collaboration

Provide regular, concise updates and financial insights to the management and operations teams.



Diligently follow up on pending items and outstanding documentation to ensure no financial task remains unfinished.



Gemini said

title: Graphic Designer / Production Artist
description:
DTF Virginia is seeking an experienced Graphic Designer / Production Artist who fully understands DTF production requirements, Roland workflows, and specialty-effect artwork. This position requires someone who can consistently deliver accurate, print-ready files without oversight or rework.



This role supports customers who submit artwork via
, requiring precise interpretation of specifications and flawless production execution.

Core Responsibilities (Daily Work)

• Create accurate, error-free gang sheets for customers who submit artwork via
, strictly following provided specifications (sizes, quantities, spacing, and layout).

• Vector, redraw, clean up, and improve customer artwork as needed.

• Prepare artwork specifically for DTF printing, including correct sizing, clean vectors, smooth edges, optimized paths, and production-safe line thickness.

• Identify and correct issues that could impact print quality or adhesion.

• Add clean, accurate cut lines for Roland print/cut workflows.

• Prepare fully print-ready files for Roland production with no downstream adjustments.

• Create and prepare spangle files for production use.

• Apply faux specialty effects including faux embroidery (digitized embroidery-style artwork), faux glitter, sparkle, textured, and 3D effects.

• Understand and apply digitizing principles when creating embroidery-style effects for print.

• Apply spot colors correctly for textured UV printing.

• Create clean, print-safe halftone artwork.

• Accurately replicate fonts when required.

• Deliver files that are complete, accurate, and print-ready upon receipt.

Required Skills & Experience

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (vector-based production workflow).

• Proven experience preparing artwork for DTF printing in a production environment.

• Strong understanding of Roland print/cut requirements.

• Hands-on experience with spangle files and specialty-effect artwork.

• Excellent attention to detail and production accuracy.

• Ability to work independently and manage deadlines.

• True design and production skills required – AI-generated artwork is not acceptable for this role.

Schedule & Expectations

Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM (East Coast hours).

This role requires minimal supervision.

Files must be correct the first time—accuracy is critical to production flow.

 for communication

title: Chartered Structural Engineer
description:
Freelance Chartered Structural Engineer Required (UK Projects)



We are seeking an experienced Freelance Chartered Structural Engineer to support a growing pipeline of residential projects across the UK.



About the Role

You will be responsible for carrying out structural assessments, calculations, and producing design solutions for a variety of property types, including house extensions, loft conversions, and refurbishments. The role is flexible and project-based, with work allocated as required.

Key Responsibilities



* Structural design and analysis of beams, lintels, and load-bearing elements

* Preparation of clear and compliant structural calculations and reports

* Liaising with architects, surveyors, and project stakeholders

* Ensuring designs comply with current UK Building Regulations and Eurocodes



**Requirements**



* Chartered Structural Engineer (CEng MIStructE or equivalent)

* Proven experience working on **UK residential properties**

* Strong working knowledge of **TEDDS** and/or **Tekla Structural Designer**

* Ability to produce accurate and efficient structural calculations

* Good communication and report-writing skills

* Professional indemnity insurance (preferred)



If you are a reliable and detail-oriented Chartered Engineer with strong UK property experience, we would like to hear from you.

title: N8N Automation Freelancer (Remote, Flexible)
description:
Hey! I run a bunch of YouTube channels. And we constantly need some tools to let us make content faster and save time. Essentially, we want to automate the manual repetitive boring tasks.



Mostly, we build these automations using N8N and Claude. And right now we are looking for a person who can help us to do that.



You do NOT need to be a senior expert for this role.

We’re open to junior-level freelancers as long as you have hands-on experience with N8N and a good understanding of how automations work.



This is not a full-time position, we’re looking for a freelancer we can reach out to whenever we need new automations.



Who This Role Is Perfect For:

-> You have experience building automations using N8N

-> You’ve worked with APIs, webhooks, or custom functions (JavaScript/Python)

-> You can follow simple briefs and build clean, logical flows

-> You’re reliable, respond quickly, and don’t disappear mid-task



What You’ll Do:

-> Build workflows (N8N or sometimes outside of it) that automate manual repetitive tasks (like searching for video ideas, writing scripts for videos, etc…)

-> Help us to save time with automations, with the goal of automating/removing the manual work as much as it’s possible

-> Keep things simple and efficient, no overengineering



Pay & Perks:

-> Task-based payments, based on complexity

-> Fully remote: work from anywhere

-> No meetings or handholding, we send you a task, you deliver the project

-> Ongoing freelance work (weekly or monthly tasks as needed)

-> Opportunity for long-term collaboration as we scale



How to Apply:

Fill out this short application form:





If you know how to build clean N8N automations and want creative flexible work with a team that values speed and simplicity, we’d love to hear from you.



Let’s build better systems together.

title: Social Media Outreach for Property Management Business
description:
Job Title

Virtual Assistant - Social Media Outreach & Lead Generation for Airbnb Management Business



About The Role

I'm looking for a reliable, hard-working individual to help me scale outreach for my Airbnb property management business. You'll be sending personalised messages to landlords and property owners on Instagram,
, and other social media platforms using pre-written scripts I provide.

This is a straightforward, script-based role. Your job is to follow the processes, send quality messages, track responses, and help me connect with potential clients who might benefit from our service. 



What You'll Be Doing

Sending personalised outreach messages to targeted landlords and property owners on Instagram,
, and other platforms

Following pre-written scripts I provide (you'll adapt names, details, and personalisation points)

Manage outreach lists - I'll provide you with contact lists; you'll work through them systematically

Track and log responses in a simple spreadsheet (e.g. number of messages sent, contact details, whether they responded positively or declined/ignored)

Flag interested leads for me to follow up with directly

Maintain professional, friendly communication that represents my brand well

Work within platform limits to avoid spam flags or account restrictions



Requirements

Essential:

Fluent English (written) - messages must be natural, grammatically correct, and professional

Experience with messaging on Instagram,
 and other social media platforms - you know how to send DMs, navigate platforms, and avoid being flagged as spam

Attention to detail - you can personalise messages accurately (names, company names, specifics)

Reliable and consistent - you can commit to 100 messages a day

Good communication - you respond promptly and keep me updated on progress

Comfortable with repetitive tasks - this is high-volume outreach, so you need to be consistent and disciplined



Highly Desirable:

Previous experience in cold outreach and lead generation

Familiarity with property management, real estate, or landlord niches

Experience using spreadsheets to track outreach

Knowledge of Instagram/Facebook messaging best practices to avoid spam filters



What I'll Provide You

Pre-written outreach scripts (you'll adapt with names and personalisation)

Contact lists with names, account handles, and any relevant details

Clear instructions on how to personalise and send messages

A simple tracking template to log responses

Ongoing support - I'm available to answer questions and refine the process



Ideal Candidate

You're someone who:

Is organised and process-driven - you follow systems well

Takes pride in quality work - even if it's repetitive, you do it properly

Is trustworthy and professional - you're representing my business

Can work independently - you don't need constant supervision

Is comfortable with rejection - not everyone will respond positively, and that's fine



Deliverables & Expectations

Send 100 personalized messages per day

Maintain a daily activity log showing:

Number of messages sent

Number of responses received

Number of interested leads flagged

Name and contact details of lead for follow up

Flag interested leads within 24 hours so I can follow up quickly

Respond to any clarifying questions from contacts professionally (using guidance I provide)



Work Schedule & Commitment

40 hours per week (flexible schedule, but consistent output required)

100 messages per day target

Preferred working hours: UK time 9am-5pm

Availability for brief weekly check-ins via WhatsApp to sync on progress

This post is for 1 month initially, with the potential for a longer term agreement dependant on the success during this month



How to Apply

Please fill in the following application form at the link below:


 



Red Flags (Please Do Not Apply If):

You plan to use bots or automation

You can't commit to consistent, quality work

You're not fluent in written English

You're not comfortable with direct outreach/sales messaging



Next Steps

If this sounds like a good fit, please apply at the link below. I'll review applications and reach out to shortlisted candidates within 48 hours for a brief interview.

Looking forward to working with someone reliable who can help me scale this outreach effectively!



Application Form


 



Jak Parker

Jak Parker Property Management

:

title: Experienced Virtual Assistant for Manhattan Real Estate Firm
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a self-motivated, autonomous, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support a high-performing real estate executive based in Manhattan, New York. This is an all-encompassing role that blends administrative support, transaction coordination, marketing, and light accounting. You’ll be a critical partner, helping to organize operations, streamline communication, and grow our digital presence.

Manage a high volume of
s across multiple inboxes and respond with professionalism.

Support in preparing LOIs, leases, and due diligence documentation.

Liaise with attorneys, brokers, and clients to ensure smooth transactions.

Manage and post across Instagram, LinkedIn, and Google My Business using cohesive brand storytelling.

Use tools like Canva to create compelling visuals.

Schedule and publish content using tools like Later or Buffer.



6. Website & CRM Management



Maintain and create webpages on Wix, especially for active listings.

Keep CRM (Followupbpss) organized with appropriate customer tagging and tracking.

Update listing sites and syndication platforms with accurate and timely data.



7. Travel & Logistics



Arrange domestic and international travel, including flights, hotels, and car services.

Maintain an organized travel calendar and prepare itineraries.



Qualifications:

Minimum 3 years of experience supporting real estate executives or founders (U.S. experience preferred).

Excellent written and spoken English communication.

Proven ability to work autonomously, prioritize tasks, and take initiative.



Proficiency with:



Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

Canva

CRM platforms

Wix (or willingness to learn quickly)

Mailchimp, Instagram, LinkedIn

Competitive pay based on experience and performance

Your resume



A brief note about your relevant experience

title: Construction Project Manager
description:
About Us

At Structura Builders, we’re raising the bar on what it means to build with integrity, precision, and care. With offices in San Diego, CA & Minneapolis, MN, we specialize in high-performance commercial and mixed-use projects. As we expand our presence in California & Minnesota and beyond, we're seeking a Remote Construction Project Manager to drive project execution, collaborate across teams, and deliver exceptional results — all while upholding our commitment to quality, safety, and innovation.



The Role

We’re looking for an experienced, proactive, and highly organized Construction Project Manager to join our team remotely and lead project execution from preconstruction through closeout. You’ll be responsible for project planning, subcontractor coordination, and ensuring that projects are completed safely, on time, and within budget. Working closely with field teams and senior leadership, you’ll help ensure Structura Builders delivers on its promise of excellence. 



Key Responsibilities



• Oversee all phases of assigned projects remotely, from preconstruction through final punch and closeout

• Develop and maintain detailed project schedules, budgets, and work plans

• Coordinate and communicate with project superintendents, subcontractors, and field teams to ensure project milestones are achieved

• Review and manage project documentation, including submittals, RFIs, change orders, and meeting minutes

• Ensure compliance with project specifications, drawings, and contract requirements

• Support safety initiatives by collaborating with field superintendents to enforce compliance with OSHA and Structura’s safety protocols

• Collaborate with clients, architects, and engineers to resolve challenges and maintain project 
ntum

• Prepare and review project reports, including financial tracking, budget updates, and work-in-place verification

• Manage project information and communication using Procore, Autodesk Project Management, 
, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, and Sage Intacct

• Ensure all work complies with ICC Building Codes, including California and Minnesota-specific requirements

• Maintain proactive and transparent communication with all project stakeholders

________________________________________

? What You’ll Bring

• Minimum 7 years of experience working for a U.S.-based company in a project management role for commercial and mixed-use construction

• Proven experience managing complex construction projects from ground-up through closeout

• In-depth knowledge of Procore, Autodesk Project Management, 
, and other project management platforms

• Strong technical understanding of construction processes, project sequencing, and subcontractor management

• Familiarity with ICC Building Codes, with specific knowledge of California and Minnesota standards

• Strong financial acumen, with experience tracking project costs and progress against budgets

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a collaborative, team-focused mindset

• Ability to read and interpret plans, shop drawings, and project specifications

• Commitment to quality, safety, and continuous improvement





Why Structura Builders?

• We build with purpose and precision

• Our leadership empowers remote tea
mbers to make an impact

• You’ll join a tight-knit team that values innovation and collaboration

• We don’t just manage projects — we execute with pride

title: Kajabi Community Manager
description:
We’re looking for someone who can take ownership of our Kajabi community and turn it into a space that is engaged, responsive, and well-run. This is not just a posting role—you are responsible for the overall experience inside the community.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Welcome and onboard new members so they feel oriented and included

Keep conversations active through thoughtful prompts and follow-ups

Respond to member questions clearly, promptly, and professionally

Moderate discussions with good judgment and strong boundaries

Post updates, announcements, and engagement content

Support live sessions and community activities

Maintain structure, organization, and consistency in the space



WEEKLY OPERATIONS (Critical)

Start and host 5 weekly Zoom calls (Thursday–Sunday evenings)

Record each 1-hour long session and ensure recordings are saved properly

Upload recordings to Kajabi promptly and accurately

Post announcements in Kajabi community and Whatsapp when recordings are ready, including clear access links

Share the Zoom link before each live session in WhatsApp groups

Share the recording link the following day in WhatsApp groups



REQUIREMENTS

Strong written communication—clear, concise, and professional

Warm, responsive, and emotionally intelligent

Strong customer service skills—you genuinely enjoy working with people

Reliable, organized, and consistent with follow-through

Comfortable managing an online community independently

Expert-level experience with Kajabi communities (required)

Comfortable managing Zoom sessions, recordings, and uploads

Able to take initiative without needing constant direction

Available and responsive to messages

Available evenings and weekends (must be live for scheduled sessions)

Schedule 5 groups per week (Thursday–Sunday)

Evening availability required



TOP CANDIDATES

1. Flawless execution of weekly operations—Zoom calls start on time, recordings are handled correctly, and uploads and announcements happen without reminders

2. Highly responsive and dependable—messages are answered promptly and nothing falls through the cracks

3. Strong attention to detail—links are correct, communication is clear, and everything is posted in the right place at the right time

4. Confident managing both Kajabi and WhatsApp communication seamlessly

5. Takes full ownership—sees what needs to be done and does it without being asked





APPLY

To be considered, complete all steps below:

1. Watch this Book Club video:

description:
JOB TITLE:

Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're a digital marketing agency that works with service-based businesses (medspas, home services, fitness, legal, etc.), primarily in the US market. We're looking for a full-time Video Editor & Graphic Designer who can create scroll-stopping content across multiple formats.



You'll be our go-to creative person — editing short-form videos for social media, producing ad creatives for Meta and Google campaigns, and designing graphics for our clients' brands. You'll also work with AI tools like HeyGen and ElevenLabs to produce AI-generated video and voiceover content.



This isn't a "just cut clips together" role. You'll be creating content that directly drives leads and sales for real businesses, so you need to understand what makes people stop scrolling, click, and take action.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) — fast-paced, hook-driven, optimized for engagement

-Create video ads for Meta and Google campaigns (direct response style)

-Produce client deliverables such as testimonial videos, promo videos, and brand content

-Use AI video/voice tools (HeyGen, ElevenLabs) to create and enhance content

-Design static graphics — social media posts, ad creatives, thumbnails, banners

-Collaborate with our team on content strategy and creative direction

-Maintain consistent quality and meet turnaround deadlines



REQUIREMENTS:

-At least 2 years of experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

-Strong graphic design skills (Canva Pro at minimum; Photoshop/Illustrator is a plus)

-Experience editing short-form, direct-response, or social media content (not just vlogs or cinematic edits)

-Familiarity with AI content tools — HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar platforms

-Good eye for typography, color, and layout

-Understands hooks, pacing, and what performs well on social platforms

-Reliable internet connection and able to work during reasonable overlap hours

-Can manage multiple projects and hit deadlines without constant follow-up



NICE TO HAVE (Not Required, But a Big Plus):

-Experience designing or building landing pages (using tools like GoHighLevel, WordPress, Unbounce, or similar)

-Background working in or with a digital marketing agency

-Basic understanding of paid ads and what makes a creative convert

-Motion graphics or animation skills



COMPENSATION:

-Full-time position

-Salary is open and negotiable based on your experience and skill level

-Long-term role with room to grow as the agency scales



HOW TO APPLY:



Important: To make sure you actually read this post, please start your application with the word "Creative" — applications that don't include this will be skipped.



In your application, include:



-A brief intro about yourself and your relevant experience

-Links to your portfolio or samples of your work (video edits, graphics, landing pages if applicable)

-Which AI tools you've used and how you've used them

-Your expected monthly salary (in USD)

-Your availability to start



We review every application that follows these instructions. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Property Manager – Short-Term Rentals
description:
Property Manager – Short-Term Rentals

Bali & Australia | Remote | Long-Term Role



We manage premium short-term rentals across Bali and Australia and are hiring an experienced Property Manager to oversee day-to-day operations.



This role starts part-time (10–15 hours per week) with a clear pathway to full-time within 2–3 months for the right person.



Before You Apply – Please Read Carefully

- This is not an entry-level role

- Guesty + OTA experience is mandatory

- You must be confident handling guest issues independently

- This is a long-term role with growth opportunities



If you do not meet these requirements, please do not apply.



The Role

As Property Manager, you will be responsible for the day-to-day operational performance of our portfolio — ensuring listings run smoothly, guests are well looked after, and on-the-ground teams are prepared and aligned.



Key responsibilities include:



- Managing live listings across Airbnb, 
, VRBO/Stayz and other OTAs

- Handling guest communication from enquiry through to post check-out

- Coordinating housekeeping and maintenance teams

- Scheduling cleans, maintenance tasks and urgent call-outs

- Ensuring properties meet high cleanliness and presentation standards

- Troubleshooting guest issues calmly and professionally

- Supporting daily operations and administration, including:



- Managing
s

- Filing and sorting

- Sending invoices to accounts

- Uploading receipts to Hubdoc and Guesty for properties and the business

- Creating, refining and implementing SOPs to streamline operations (this is a key part of the role)



What We’re Looking For

This is not a junior role. We are looking for someone who understands the short-term rental industry and thrives in a fast-moving environment.



You must have:



- 3+ years’ experience in short-term rental, hotel or accommodation management

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong problem-solving skills and calm decision-making under pressure

- Experience managing contractors (cleaners, maintenance, trades)

- High attention to detail and pride in quality standards

- Strong organisation and time-management skills

- Must be efficient

- Confidence handling guest complaints and sensitive situations

- Ability to follow systems and improve them

- Availability to respond to urgent matters when required



Industry knowledge required:



- Solid understanding of Australian and/or Asian STR markets

- Awareness of guest expectations in premium or luxury accommodation



Software & Platform Experience (Essential)

You must be confident with:



- Guesty

- OTA setup and management

- Airbnb, 
, VRBO / Stayz, Expedia, Marriott Homes, 
 and others

-  WhatsApp (daily operational communication)



No Guesty + OTA experience = do not apply.



Bonus (not essential):



- SuiteOp experience



Hours, Pay & Growth



- Start: 10–15 hours per week

- Progression: Full-time role within approximately 2–3 months (performance-based)

- USD $7-8 per hour (reviewed as the role expands)

-  Schedule: Flexible, with some responsiveness required outside standard hours



This is a long-term position for someone looking to grow with the business.



How to Apply (Important)

To be considered, please submit all of the following:



1. Resume

   Highlight relevant STR, hotel or property management experience.



2. Short Video Introduction (Priority)

   Please tell us:



* Who you are

* Your STR experience

* Why this role interests you



Applications with a video will be prioritised.



3. Written responses to the questions below

   Detailed, structured answers are required. Short or vague responses will not be considered.



4. Tell us about a time a guest complained about cleaning standards. What steps did you take from complaint to resolution, and how did you prevent it from happening again?



5. A guest reports an urgent issue at 11:30pm (e.g. no hot water or AC failure). Walk us through exactly what you would do, step-by-step.



6. You notice a property has received two 4-star reviews in a row due to small maintenance issues. What actions would you take operationally and strategically?



7. This role involves building and improving SOPs. Share an example of a process or system you’ve created or improved. What problem did it solve and what was the outcome?



30-day paid trial applies.



Applications that do not answer all questions will not be considered.



Final filter

To confirm you have read this post carefully, start your application with the words:



I have Guesty + OTA experience.

description:

We Fix IT is a Darwin-based managed IT services company, and we're looking for someone who can grow our digital presence, improve our search rankings, and help us generate more inbound leads. This role suits someone who is proactive, analytically minded, and fluent in English, with a proven ability to drive organic growth for a service-based business.

Key Requirements:



A degree or diploma in Marketing, Digital Media, IT, or a related field (or equivalent demonstrated experience).

Proficient in English (both written and spoken).

Strong experience in SEO, content marketing, and/or web management.

Familiarity with WordPress or similar CMS platforms.

Experience with SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Google Search Console.

Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.

Strong analytical, organisational, and communication skills.

Experience working with IT, tech, or B2B service businesses is a strong advantage.



Job Details:



Work Hours: 6:30 AM – 3:30 PM (Monday to Friday)

Starting Pay: From 50,000 PHP per month (based on experience)

Additional Hours: Paid extra as required

Location: Remote

Updated Resume

Audio Recording: Introduce yourself and explain why you're the best fit for this role.

Skill Rating

On-Page SEO (titles, meta, structure, internal linking) /10

Off-Page SEO (link building, outreach) /10

Google Search Console & Analytics /10

SEO Tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, etc.) /10

WordPress Website Management /10

Content Writing / Copywriting (technical/IT topics) /10

Social Media Management/10Google Ads / Meta Ads (paid) /10

 Marketing (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, etc.) /10

English – Confident Written Communication/10



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Operations & Admin Virtual Assistant (Full?Time, Long?Term Role)
description:
We are a growing international tabletop game and entertainment company looking for a full?time Operations & Administrative Virtual Assistant to help us manage our day?to?day business operations. You will work directly with the founder and core team to keep projects moving, documents organized, and tasks on schedule as we scale our products globally.



This is a long?term role with strong growth potential for the right person. We are looking for someone who wants stable, long?term employment, not short?term gigs.



Key responsibilities:



1. Manage and organize files and documentation in Google Drive, Google Docs, Google Sheets and Microsoft Office



2. Create and update documents, reports, checklists and SOPs based on our guidance



3. Assist with basic project management: tracking tasks, deadlines and deliverables in spreadsheets or simple tools



4. Prepare and format presentations, summaries and simple reports for internal use



5. Support content operations (e.g. organizing assets, naming files correctly, keeping folders clean and up to date)



6. Perform internet research and compile information into clear, structured documents or sheets



7. Coordinate calendars, reminders and follow?ups for meetings and deadlines



8. Communicate professionally via
 and chat with our internal team and external partners when needed



9. Use Canva for simple asset handling (organizing designs, exporting correct sizes, basic text edits or layout adjustments – no advanced graphic design required)



Requirements:



1. Strong written and spoken English



2. Very comfortable with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail) and Microsoft Office



3. Basic to intermediate Canva skills (able to work with templates, simple edits and exports)



4. Reliable computer and stable internet connection suitable for full?time remote work



5. Ability to follow detailed instructions and documented processes (SOPs)



6. Highly organized, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple tasks at once



7. Willing to work full?time (8 hours per day, 5 days per week) with at least a few hours overlap with Australian business hours (AEST) for check?ins and calls



8. Honest, dependable and looking for a long?term position



What we offer:



1. Starting salary of $500 USD per month for full?time work (8 hours/day, 5 days/week)



2. Long?term, stable role with a minimum 6?month contract and the intention to keep you for years if we are a good fit



3. Salary reviews and increases based on performance and hitting agreed KPIs/targets



4. Opportunities to grow into a more senior operations or project management role as the company expands



5. Direct, respectful communication and clear expectations – we want you to feel like part of the core team, not just “a freelancer”



How to apply:

Please send:



A short introduction about yourself and your experience with admin/operations work



A link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile



A brief description (3–5 sentences) of a system or process you created or improved for a previous client/employer



Your internet speed test result link and a screenshot of your computer specs



Include the word “FOCUS” at the very top of your message so we know you read the entire job post.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Fully Flexible, $3,000-$5,000 / month )
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: 
tion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f
ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Automation & Systems Integrator (n8n, CRM, APIs, WhatsApp)
description:
About the Role



We are a short-term rental management company (Nova Escapes) operating across Bali and Australia.



We have an existing automation and integration system partially built (n8n, CRM, WhatsApp, payments), and we are looking for someone to step in, complete key integrations, and get the system working end-to-end.



This is a project-based role, not full-time employment.

We are looking for someone who can deliver outcomes, not ongoing dependency.



Scope (Phase 1 – Immediate Work)



We need someone to complete and stabilise the following:

- Set up and finalise CRM pipelines and automations (GoHighLevel)

- Connect WhatsApp API and enable messaging flows

- Integrate Guesty with CRM and WhatsApp

- Connect Xendit (Payment processor) to SuiteOp and Guesty for payment links and workflows

- Integrate SuiteOp for guest experience triggers

- Set up Slack notifications for internal team



The goal is a simple, working system — not over-engineered.



First Task (Paid Trial)

The first task will be:

- Review our current n8n workflows and system setup

- Identify what is working vs broken

- Fix key issues and complete core integrations

- Get one end-to-end flow working (lead ? CRM ? WhatsApp ? payment)



You should be able to clearly explain:

- what you would check first

- what you would fix first

- how you would simplify the system



Current Stack:

- Guesty (PMS)

- GoHighLevel (CRM)

- SuiteOp (Guest Portal and Tasks)

- n8n (automation)

- WhatsApp API (in progress)

- Xendit, Stripe, Merchant Warrior (payments)

- Slack (not setup yet)

- Google  

- Dropbox



What We’re Looking For

- Strong experience with automation tools (n8n, Make, APIs, webhooks)

- Experience building CRM pipelines and automation flows

- Ability to connect multiple systems end-to-end

- Comfortable reviewing and improving an existing system (not starting from scratch)

- Able to debug and fix broken workflows (not just build from scratch)

- Able to work with incomplete or messy systems and bring clarity

- Experience with AI integrations (e.g. OpenAI, Gemini, chatbots, or AI workflows)

- Ability to implement simple, practical AI use cases (not over-engineered systems)

- Strong focus on getting systems working first, then layering AI where useful

- Focus on simplicity, reliability, and execution



Not The Right Fit

- Web developers or designers

- Anyone without API / integration experience

- Anyone who over-engineers or builds unnecessary complexity



Engagement

- Start with a paid audit + implementation (20–30 hours)

- If a good fit, we will continue with ongoing tasks as needed

- We are NOT looking for someone full-time or long-term dependency



How to Apply

Please include:

- Examples of automation/integration systems you have built

- Tools you have worked with (n8n, APIs, CRM, etc.)

- A short explanation of how you would approach fixing and simplifying an existing system



Screening Question (Required)

- If a WhatsApp message is received, but the contact is not being created in the CRM:

- What are the first 3 things you would check?



Final Note

We are looking for someone who can get things working quickly and cleanly — not someone who builds complex systems that take months to complete.

title: Real Estate & Sales and Marketing Assistant - 20260321

 campaigns)

5. Administrative Support

- Organize documents and files related to listings and transactions

- Assist with basic
 communication and task coordination



6. Simple Web and Automation Support

- Experience in updating Wordpress websites

- Experience in setting up task automation usng Zapier or Maker



Qualifications

- Previous experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant is a must

- Strong research and data organization skills

- Familiarity with real estate terminology and basic market analysis

- Experience with spreadsheets (Google Sheets or Excel)

- Experience with CRM systems and marketing tools is a plus

- Strong written English communication skills

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines but also able to collaborate in team environment and do zoo
etings daily



Preferred Skills

- Familiarity of AI assisted content generation: writing, images, and video

, LinkedIn)

Compensation

- fixed pay

How to Apply

title: Podcast Production QA & Support Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a Podcast Production QA & Support Specialist for a long-term, stable role on our team.



This is not a beginner role, and it is not just an editing role.



We need someone who understands the full podcast production process well enough to review deliverables for quality, catch issues before they reach the client, and jump into production tasks when needed to help the tea
et deadlines.



You should have hands-on experience with podcast production and content workflows, including editing, show notes, titles, platform-specific packaging, short-form content, and creative assets. You do not need to be the primary person doing every task all day, but you do need to understand the process deeply enough to spot problems quickly and step in confidently when necessary.



We’re looking for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, proactive, and wants to grow with a team long term.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



• Review podcast deliverables before they are sent to clients or published

• Catch issues in audio, video, show notes, titles, timestamps, graphics, clips, and other content assets

• Make sure work meets internal standards, client expectations, and platform best practices

• Help ensure projects stay on schedule and nothing slips through the cracks

• Support the production team during busy periods or deadline pressure

• Jump into editing, writing, repurposing, packaging, or related production tasks when needed

• Review content with an understanding of the difference between audio platforms, YouTube, and short-form social content

• Check for accuracy, polish, completeness, consistency, and brand alignment

• Help improve workflows, handoffs, checklists, and quality control systems over time

• Communicate clearly with the team and flag issues early



You are a strong fit if you:



• Have real experience working in podcast production or closely related content workflows

• Understand the full production process from raw files to final deliverables

• Can identify quality issues quickly and explain what needs to be fixed

• Have strong judgment, not just task execution

• Can jump into production work when needed and actually know what you’re doing

• Are highly organized and dependable

• Pay close attention to detail without losing sight of deadlines

• Can write clearly in English

• Understand the difference between content for Spotify and Apple Podcasts, YouTube, and short-form social platforms

• Want a long-term role with room to grow



You Should Be Comfortable Reviewing, Giving Feedback and Supporting Work Such As



• Audio and video podcast edits

• Show notes and episode descriptions

• Episode titles

• Timestamps

• YouTube packaging and presentation

• Shorts, reels, and clips

• Social media graphics and supporting assets

• General production handoff quality and completeness



This Role Is NOT For You If



• You do not have hands-on podcast or content production experience

• You only know one part of the process and cannot think across the full workflow

• You need constant direction to spot obvious problems

• You are only looking for short-term freelance work

• You struggle with deadlines, follow-through, or communication

• You cannot switch between reviewing work and executing work when needed

• You do not pay close attention to detail

• You disappear and leave the team hanging



To apply, follow these instructions exactly. Applications that do not follow the instructions will be ignored.



1) Start your application with this exact line:



Quality First, Deadlines Matter



2) Include the following:



• Your full name

• Country and timezone

• Weekly availability

• Tools and software you use

• Internet speed

• Computer specs

• How many podcast episodes or client accounts you can realistically help oversee each week

• Your CV, portfolio, website if you have one



3) Send 3 relevant samples only



These must include:



• At least 1 example of a podcast or interview-style episode you worked on

• At least 1 example of a short-form clip or repurposed asset

• At least 1 example that shows your involvement in quality control, packaging, review, or final delivery standards



For each sample, explain exactly what you did.



4) Answer these questions in full sentences:



• A. When reviewing a podcast episode before delivery, what are the main things you check?

• B. What is the difference between content that is ready for Audio Podcasts versus content that is ready for YouTube?

• C. If a deadline is close and an episode still needs fixes, how do you d
 what to prioritize first?

• D. Tell us about a time you caught an issue before it reached a client or audience. What was the issue, and how did you handle it?

• E. Tell us about a time you had to jump into production work to help a team hit a deadline. What did you do?



5) Include this exact line somewhere in your application:



I am looking for a long-term role and I am comfortable working in both quality control and production support.



Bonus Points If You Also Include



• Before and after examples of work you improved

• Examples of checklists, QA systems, or workflows you helped improve

• Experience working inside an agency or fast-paced production environment

• Examples showing that you understand content strategy, not just technical execution

• Any examples of catching issues in titles, descriptions, graphics, clips, or publishing workflows



This role is for someone who can help us protect quality and keep production moving.



You should be the kind of person who can look at a deliverable, know whether it is truly ready, and step in when needed to help get it across the finish line.



If that sounds like you, apply carefully and follow the instructions exactly.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
TYPE OF WORK: Full Time

Work Setup: Remote

HOURS PER WEEK: 40



Company Overview



Mood Solutions is a growing ecommerce business building and operating direct-to-consumer brands. We are a small team working across ecommerce and creative projects, and we are looking for a reliable Graphic Designer to support our creative and marketing needs.



This role is best suited for someone with strong design skills, excellent attention to detail, and experience creating visuals for ecommerce, social media, and advertising.



About the Role



We are looking for a Graphic Designer to help create and maintain high-quality visual content across our brands.



This role is focused on producing clean, effective, and on-brand designs for marketing and ecommerce. You will be responsible for creating ad creatives, product images, thumbnails, and other visual assets that support our campaigns and store performance.



The ideal candidate is creative, organized, dependable, and comfortable working in a fast-paced ecommerce environment. We are looking for someone who can follow design direction, maintain consistency, and take initiative when needed.



Key Responsibilities



Create high-quality graphics for ads, social media, and marketing campaigns

Expert use of AI tools to generate / modify images and support efficiency of workflow.

Design product images, infographics, and ecommerce creatives

Create thumbnails, banners, and promotional visuals

Maintain brand consistency across all designs and platforms

Edit and improve existing creatives based on performance feedback

Prepare design files for different platforms (Meta ads, websites, etc.)

Support product launches with creative assets

Collaborate with tea
mbers to execute creative ideas



Tools We Use



Canva

Gemini Nano Banana Pro

Freepik / Higgsfield

Figma (optional)

Adobe Photoshop (Optional)

Adobe Illustrator (Optional)

ClickUp



Qualifications



At least 2 to 3 years of relevant graphic design or freelancing experience

Must have a portfolio to present showcasing ecommerce, ads, or social media designs

Proficiency in design tools like Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, or Figma

• Extremely detail-oriented

Must Have C1 or C2 English 



Must Be Comfortable With:



• Performance metrics

• Structured operating procedures

• U.S. healthcare workflows

title: Data Analyst
description:
Data Analyst (SQL + Superset) | Remote | Long Term



We are looking for a highly capable Data Analyst to support a US-based healthcare data team.



This role is focused on exploring datasets, identifying issues, and building reliable dashboards, not just executing predefined tasks.



You should be comfortable working independently and taking ownership of your work.



What you’ll be doing:

- Write advanced SQL queries to analyze and validate data

- Explore datasets to identify inconsistencies, gaps, and potential issues

- Build and maintain dashboards (Apache Superset preferred)

- Perform data QA and proactively flag problems

- Support ad hoc analysis and reporting requests

- Clearly document findings and communicate insights



What we’re looking for:

- Strong SQL skills (joins, aggregations, CTEs, debugging queries)

- Experience with BI tools (Superset strongly preferred, others acceptable)

- Ability to independently explore datasets and find issues

- High attention to detail and data accuracy

- Strong written English communication

- Reliable and responsive (this is very important)



Strong plus:

- Experience working with healthcare data

- Experience with messy or imperfect datasets

- Experience working with US-based clients or teams

- Very comfortable using AI in your tasks



What success looks like in this role:

- You don’t just complete tasks — you identify problems before being asked

- You ask good questions when something doesn’t look right

- You can take a dataset and understand it without heavy guidance



Details:

Remote (anywhere in the world)

15 to 25 hours per week

Rate: $10 to $15 per hour depending on experience

Long term opportunity with increasing responsibility



How to apply:

Please include:

- A short introduction about your experience

- A sample SQL query you’ve written (or describe a project)

- Any dashboard examples (if available)

- Your availability (hours per week + timezone)

title: Product Management (Physical Products / Manufacturing)

Opportunity for increased compensation as skills and responsibilities expand

I will teach this VA how to be a highly effective Product manager, so that in a years time they can graduate from working with me and gain their own full time role as a product manager earning $100,000+ per year.

title: Real Estate Data Pipeline Manager
description:
We are building a county-by-county real estate data pipeline system across New Jersey focused on off-market opportunities.



This is NOT a basic VA/data entry role.



We are looking for a data operator who can think, solve problems, and build structured lead pipelines using multiple data sources.



You will be responsible for identifying, collecting, organizing, and maintaining high value real estate data across multiple counties.



You will work directly with tools like DataSift, SmrtPhone, Smarter Contact, Skip Tracing platforms, PropStream, and REI Reply.



Your job is to turn raw county data into clean, actionable lead lists.



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD (PER COUNTY):



Probate / Heirship Records

Foreclosure / Lis Pendens

Tax Sale / Auction Lists

Tax Delinquency Lists

Code Violations

Condemned / Unsafe Structures

Mechanic’s Liens

IRS / State Tax Liens

HOA / Condo Liens

Utility Shut-Off Lists

Open / Expired Building Permits (City + County)

Fire Damage Reports

Sinkhole / Subsidence Data

Medicaid Recovery Liens

Eviction Records / Detainer Warrants

Child Support Judgment Liens

Quiet Title Suits (Post Tax Deed)



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:



Research and locate county-level data sources (websites, portals, public records)

Extract and organize data into structured formats

Clean and deduplicate records before importing into DataSift

Maintain clear documentation for each county (sources, process, notes)

Integrate data into our CRM and marketing systems

Use AI tools (Claude) to assist with data cleaning and structuring

Coordinate with team for consistency across counties



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:



You MUST have experience with at least 3 of the following:



DataSift

PropStream

REI Reply

Smarter Contact

SmrtPhone

Skip Tracing tools

Real estate lead generation systems



YOU ARE A GOOD FIT IF:



You can figure things out without step-by-step instructions

You are comfortable working with messy or incomplete data

You think in systems, not tasks

You write clean, organized notes and processes

You care about accuracy and consistency



YOU ARE NOT A FIT IF:



You only do basic data entry

You need constant supervision

You avoid problem-solving

You have no real estate data experience



COMPENSATION:



Starting: $4–$6/hour depending on experience

Performance-based increases available

Long-term role with growth into senior data roles



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (REQUIRED):



Answer the following:



Describe how you would find and build a tax delinquency list for a county with no obvious download available.

What tools have you used for skip tracing and how do you verify accuracy?

Which of the following have you personally worked with: DataSift, PropStream, REI Reply, Smarter Contact, SmrtPhone?

Provide a brief example of a dataset you organized or cleaned.



Applications without answers will NOT be considered.

title: E-commerce Virtual Assistant / Product Catalog Specialist (Magento 2 & Shopify)
description:
We are a growing e-commerce business based in Australia, specializing in a wide range of costumes (Halloween, Book Week, Oktoberfest, 1920s styles, etc.). We are running two separate websites—one on Shopify and one on Magento 2.

We are looking for a detail-oriented and experienced E-commerce Virtual Assistant to help us clean up our product catalogs, optimize our listings for SEO, and improve the overall shopping experience for our Australian customers.

Key Responsibilities:

• SEO Product Descriptions: Rewrite existing product descriptions to make them engaging, informative, and SEO-friendly. Strictly NO keyword stuffing. Focus on natural readability and high conversion. Experience with Semrush for keyword research is a huge plus.

• Meta Descriptions: Write compelling Meta Descriptions (under 160 characters) to improve click-through rates (CTR). Note: We do NOT use Meta Keywords, please skip them entirely.

• Image Optimization: Update and modify product "Size Chart" images (using Canva or Photoshop) to ensure they are clear, accurate, and consistent in style. Ensure all images have descriptive ALT text.

• Product Categorization: Reorganize and correctly tag/categorize products across both Magento 2 and Shopify platforms to make navigation easier for customers.

Requirements:

• MUST have hands-on experience with Magento 2. (If you only know Shopify, please do not apply).

• Strong experience managing Shopify stores.

• Excellent written English skills, with the ability to adapt to Australian English spelling (e.g., colour, centre).

• Basic graphic design skills (Canva or Photoshop) for resizing and editing size charts.

• Attention to detail and a strong understanding of on-page SEO best practices (Titles, Meta Descriptions, URL structures).

How to Apply:

To ensure you have read this job description carefully, please include the phrase "Aussie Costume Expert" at the very beginning of your application subject line. Applications without this phrase will be automatically deleted.

Please also include:

1. A brief summary of your experience with Magento 2.

2. An example or link to a product description you have written in the past.

3. Your expected hourly rate.

We look forward to working with you!

title: Short-Form B2B SaaS/AI Video Content Producer
description:
Remote • Philippines-Based • Retainer • £700–£1,500/month



Are you obsessed with AI, short-form video, and creating great content? This role might be for you.



The role in one line: 



You will be a research-driven content producer who turns loose ideas into daily short-form video scripts and presentation slide briefs across LinkedIn, TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



What You Will Do:



- You will take a loose content idea — sometimes given to you, sometimes your own — and turn it into a complete, ready-to-film package. Each package lives as a single card on a shared Notion board and contains: a script (with hook, spoken word, CTA, and caption copy), and a brief for a separate designer to build the accompanying slides that appear behind the client on camera.



- Some videos will be in faceless format using the client’s voice or AI-generated voice. You need to be comfortable creating quick screen-recordings to showcase the point you’re making. Your videos must be example-packed — never conceptual or high-level.



- The goal is one video posted per day, which means you need to stay ahead of that volume consistently. Typically 1minute long. The client approves every script before filming. Videos may be bulk-filmed in advance, so building a strong queue is a core part of your job.



Content Focus:



 - The content covers GTM strategy, AI features and tooling, and growth — not generic thought leadership. Roughly 50/50 of your output will be evergreen VS timely trend-jacking, so you need to stay on top of what’s happening in the AI and B2B marketing space.



- A critical part of your role is sourcing real data, stats, and concrete examples — especially examples of tools, features, and use cases. This is research-heavy work, and more around cohesive narratives than traditional copywriting. If you love digging into the details and turning them into tight, punchy content, you’ll enjoy this.



What Success Looks Like After 90 Days:



- The client is posting at least one video per day on a consistent schedule across channels.



- Your scripts are tight, well-researched, and require minimal revision.



- You are proactively bringing ideas to the table - not just waiting for direction.



- The Notion board should be a well-oiled queue with scripts and designer briefs always ahead of the filming schedule.



Must-Haves:



- You genuinely use and understand AI tools — not just a passing interest. We want to see that AI is part of how you actually work.



- You understand LinkedIn and TikTok content formats well, with Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts as secondary platforms.



- You can work from a very loose direction and still produce structured, detailed output without needing your hand held.



- You are a strong researcher — comfortable digging up data, stats, case studies, and real-world examples.



- Your written English is excellent. Natural, confident, and B2B-appropriate.



- You can work autonomously without timezone overlap, as long as your output stays ahead of schedule.



- You are based in the Philippines.



Nice-to-Haves:



These will help you stand out but are not dealbreakers:



- You have experience writing scripts specifically for short-form video — not just blog posts or social captions.



- You are familiar with the B2B SaaS or growth marketing space.



- You are familiar with the AI space.



- You have worked with a personal brand before, not just a company.



- You are comfortable working in Notion & Google apps.



The Setup:



- Retainer position — starting part-time/flexible, with potential to go full-time for the right person.



- Pay: £700–£1,500/month depending on experience and output.



- Fully remote. No timezone overlap required - as long as your queue stays ahead of schedule.



- Zero client interaction. This is entirely behind the scenes.



- Reference creators will be shared with you during onboarding so you know exactly what style and format to match.



- Brand voice guidance will be provided or developed together during onboarding.



If you believe you're the right fit, please send your portfolio and/or resume to 
 with the subject line: "I am your B2B SaaS/AI Video Content Producer."
