title: Video and Content Editor
description:
About Funktion Active



Funktion Active is a premium female activewear and athleisure brand where function meets fashion. We create pieces for women who want performance, style, confidence, and versatility in one. Our customer wants apparel that works hard, looks sharp, and feels good in real life — from training sessions to coffee runs to everything in between.



Our brand is built on a few non-negotiables:



Fun — We embrace the grind, support each other, celebrate wins, and bring good energy to the work

Fast & Focused — We move quickly, prioritise what matters, and keep things clean and effective

Funky — We bring creativity, individuality, and personality — always with purpose

Follow-through — We do what we say, communicate clearly, and take ownership

First Class — We care about standards, details, and delivering polished, commercially strong work



Everything we put into the world needs to reflect that — especially our content.



Role Overview



We are looking for a Video and Content Editor who can take large volumes of raw footage and turn it into polished, high-performing, on-brand content for social media, paid ads, and campaigns.



This is not a basic editing role.



We need someone who can shape content that feels sharp, current, clean, and commercially effective — with a strong focus on scroll-stopping, high-performing short-form content.



This role also plays a key part in building and maintaining a strong content reserve, ensuring the brand stays ahead rather than constantly reacting.



Scroll-Stopping & Viral Content Standard



Content should not only look good — it must perform.



We are creating content for fast-moving social environments where attention is earned, not given. Every piece should be designed to stop the scroll within the first few seconds and hold attention through to the end.



This means:



Strong hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Clean, engaging visual movement

Edits that feel native to the platform

Content that feels current and relevant



We are not chasing trends blindly, but we are also not ignoring them. The expectation is to understand what is working and apply it in a way that still feels on-brand and elevated.



The goal is to consistently produce content that is:



Highly watchable

Easy to consume

Engaging enough to be saved, shared, or replayed

Capable of performing both organically and in paid ads



Good content is not enough. It needs to compete.



Key Responsibilities

Edit raw footage into polished short-form and campaign-ready content

Identify the strongest clips, moments, and creative opportunities from large footage sets

Create clean, engaging edits with strong pacing and flow

Apply colour correction and ensure accurate product colour representation

Format content correctly for Instagram, paid ads, website, and other platforms

Add captions, text overlays, and simple motion elements where needed

Prepare final exports in a clean, organised format for the team

Maintain strong file organisation and naming conventions

Support building and managing a structured, searchable content library

Flag strong unused footage and suggest new content opportunities

Work through large footage banks consistently to build a content reserve

Deliver work that is close to final with minimal revisions required

Identify and prioritise content with strong potential to perform as scroll-stopping social content

Content Focus

Instagram Reels (primary focus)

Gym, fitness, and training content

Paid ad creatives (Meta)

TikTok-style edits

Website and campaign videos

UGC-style and behind-the-scenes content

Product and founder-led content

Expected Output

Up to 150 unique edited pieces per month

Most edits are short-form (~15 seconds)

Work through a 20+ hour footage bank consistently

Maintain a content reserve at least 4 weeks ahead

Creative & Brand Standards



Content should feel:



Fun, engaging, and on-brand

Clean, polished, and premium

Current but not cheap or overdone

Authentic while still elevated



Avoid:



Cheap-looking edits

Overused templates

Cheesy transitions or effects

Sloppy pacing

Visual inconsistency



Reference brands: CSB, Lilo, Hona Active



Workflow & Communication

Work within Google Drive systems for files, briefs, and feedback

Follow provided direction for copy, music, and creative intent

Work independently while staying aligned with priorities and timelines



Communication expectations:



Daily check-in

End-of-day update

Weekly meeting



Daily updates should include:



Completed work

Work in progress

Items awaiting review

Blockers

Next priorities



We value clear, proactive communication — no guessing, no disappearing.



Revisions & Quality Expectations

Most content should require 1–2 revisions max

First drafts should already be close to final

Work should be clean, accurate, and ready to use

What Success Looks Like

Content delivered quickly with minimal hand holding

Consistent editing quality across all outputs

Strong attention to detail and product accuracy

Initiative and problem-solving without constant direction

Content bank stays ahead (minimum 4 weeks)

Files and assets are organised and easy to use

Communication is reliable and proactive

Ideal Candidate

Mid-level to senior editor

Strong experience with short-form and social-first content

Strong eye for pacing, visuals, and content flow

Organised and comfortable managing large volumes of footage

Strong written English and communication

Experience in fitness, activewear, or ecommerce is a plus

Experience with both organic and paid content is a plus

Fast, reliable, detail-oriented, and accountable

Not a Fit If You

Are slow, disorganised, or inconsistent

Need constant direction for simple decisions

Struggle with volume or deadlines

Produce generic, low-quality, or template-heavy work

Miss details or create workflow chaos

Role Structure

Full-time or contract (depending on candidate)

~40 hours per week

Long-term opportunity with growth potential

Confidentiality



You will have access to unreleased campaigns and internal content. Professionalism and discretion are required.



Final Note



We are looking for someone who gives a damn.



Someone fast, sharp, organised, and proud of the work they put out.

Someone who can take raw footage and turn it into content that actually looks like a brand.



Someone who understands:



Fun doesn’t mean messy

Premium doesn’t mean boring

Speed doesn’t mean sloppy



If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Admin / Accounts Assistant – Light Weekly Work (Expense Logging & Cleanup)
description:
Hi,



I run a small freelance marketing business in Australia and I’m looking for someone to help with light admin and account support in my system called Moxie.



This is a very small ongoing role (around 1-2 hours per week to start with), helping me keep my account organised and up to date. The work is simple but I need someone reliable and detail-focused.



Tasks may include:



Logging expenses in Moxie (I will
 the expenses to you)

Checking projects and time logs are correct

Cleaning up and organising my Moxie account

Updating client records

Simple invoice / admin checks when needed

General tidy-up of my system



Occasionally I may also need help with:



Building Statements of Work in Moxie

Setting up project templates

Updating project details

Learning more about how to use Moxie features to keep my business organised



The clean-up work does not need to be done quickly.

It can be done slowly over time, whenever it suits you, as long as things stay organised.



I only have a couple of clients at the moment, so this is not full bookkeeping — just basic admin and account support.



If my business grows, the hours may increase over time.



Requirements:



Good attention to detail

Comfortable using online systems

Reliable and organised - happy to communicate via Slack / WhatsApp / Trello

Good written English

Happy to do small tasks carefully



Nice to have (not required):



Experience with Moxie, Xero, or invoicing systems

Experience with admin or accounts support

Experience working with freelancers or small businesses



Hours:



About 1 hour per week to start

Flexible timing

Ongoing work

Potential for more hours in future



To apply, please answer the questions below and include the word Moxie in your application.



1. Have you worked with invoicing, bookkeeping, or admin systems before?

If yes, which ones?

2. This role is very small (around 1 - 2 hours per week).

3. Are you happy with a small ongoing job that may grow over time?

4. Are you comfortable learning a new system (Moxie) and doing slow clean-up / organisation tasks?

5 . How many hours per week are you currently working for other clients?

6. Why do you think you would be a good fit for this type of role?

title: Systems Support Co-ordinator
description:
Systems Support Co-ordinator

at Embrace the Middle East

IT • High Wycombe, England, United Kingdom • Part-time, Hybrid - 1 day per week from the office. 

Analyse my fit

Description

Job title: Systems Support Co-ordinator





Contract basis: Fixed-term, Maternity Cover, part?time (20 hours across 3 days per week).



Reporting to: CRM & Systems Manager



Cluster: Shared Services



Team: IT



Salary: £15,986.30 + £312 working from home allowance (total part-time salary, £16,298.30



per annum). This is based on full-time equivalent of £29,175 per annum.



Job Band: 5



Job description



Purpose:



The Shared Services Cluster provide a service to our supporters, a centralised data management resource and administrative support of various kinds for the whole organisation.



This role combines establishing CRM best practice across the organisation as part of Embrace’s Shared Services team, providing an outward facing service to supporters, with some specific inward facing administrative support to other teams at Embrace.



The role requires close attention to detail, the understanding of data and processes regarding the charity’s central database (CRM), and other systems, consistent with internal procedures and external regulatory requirements (e.g. data protection).





Main responsibilities



1. CRM support



2. Systems Support



3. Supporter Experience



4. Other duties as required





Key tasks:



1. CRM Support:



• Establish best practices across teams as directed by the CRM & Systems Manager, assisting in ensuring Beacon CRM is the first point of knowledge for all staff and providing support and training where appropriate for users across the organisation.



• Advise and work with the CRM & Systems Manager on key CRM tasks within agreed projects to support the team reach its targets, providing insight to help deliver process improvements within the team.



• Undertake data checks of key CRM areas, utilising data tools such as data cleaning dashboards, and highlighting key areas of improvement.



• Provide support to other teams for specific CRM tasks, including but not limited to securing approval for grant payments in line with the Financial Controls Policy, annual bulk instalment creation on the CRM, and the uploading of document templates.



• Ensure supporter data recorded in the CRM is compliant with Embrace’s Data Protection (GDPR) and Vulnerable Person policies and that any safeguarding concerns are raised/handled appropriately.



2. Systems Support



• Understand multiple systems processes across the organisation and help to implement improvements and automations where possible using APIs and no code automation platforms. Help provide resources and expertise to streamline collaborative processes with multiple stakeholders.



• Support the CRM & Systems Manager in ensuring processes across multiple systems are maintained and documented. Provide cover when the CRM & Systems Manager is on leave.



• Assist the CRM & Systems manager in the running of mailing campaigns, providing segmentation to ensure data can be analysed and information can be provided to meet KPIs. • Support insights through reporting analytics using cloud-based data insight tools. Where appropriate modifying data sets using SQL.



• Help support the end-to-end donation process, including the generation of donation pages with HTML.  



• Help and support other teams for specific tasks using Embrace systems including but not limited to updating
 templates and sending bulk
s to supporter/partners, support the running of Partner vetting to ensure compliance with financial sanctions.





3. Supporter Experience



• Provide customer service and data processing expertise to the Supporter Experience Team (SET) working with the CRM & Systems Manager and Shared Services & Legacy Manager to ensure Supporters are provided with exemplary service and that their data is correctly processed and securely stored.



• Undertake a flexible approach, prioritising work according to need, allowing for data processing and supporter service assistance where required during peak times.



4. Other duties as required:



As part of the Shared Service Cluster, be flexible if required to work across multiple teams for projects or short-term goals. Use expertise in CRM processes and methodologies for data capture and insight to deliver cross departmental improvements.



• To play an active part in the wider Embrace team by offering help and support as required.



• Develop excellent working relationships with colleagues throughout the charity.



• Model the Charity’s core values of excellence, accountability, respect, integrity, trust and



compassion at all times.



• Ensure you fully understand and uphold your safeguarding responsibilities and trust inherent with your role.



• To maintain professional boundaries with those you come into contact with and avoid behaviour which might be misinterpreted as inappropriate use of the trust inherent with your role at Embrace.



• Ensure Embrace communications are compliant with GDPR and other relevant regulations.



• Adhere to Embrace’s policies and procedures at all times.



• Undertake any other duties compatible with the role as required.



• To maintain sympathy with the Christian character of the Charity.



• Attend and participate in staff and team meetings.



• Undertake as required any other duties compatible with the role.



• Be proactive in reviewing and evaluating own performance and identifying and acting upon areas for improvement and development.



• Undertake, as required, any other duties compatible with the level and nature of the post.



Person specification



Essential Criteria





General Education



Good general education up to at least A?Level standard.

Skills and Abilities



Excellent computer literacy, including Microsoft Office Online (Word, Excel, Outlook).

Strong experience using a web?based CRM for supporter queries, financial transactions, and basic data analysis.

Experience of managing and updating webforms.

High level of organisational and administrative skills, with excellent attention to detail and accuracy.

Excellent written and spoken English.

Ability to quickly learn new processes and tasks.

Able to use own initiative.

Highly numerate and able to follow instructions for set processes.

Experience Demonstrated experience in customer relations, communication, and customer care.

Experience of no code automation tools.



Experience of clearly and accurately conveying information to a diverse audience with confidence.

Experience using bulk
 tools such as Mailchimp or SendGrid.

Experience processing financial transactions using digital systems.

Personal Qualities



Trustworthy, compassionate, and reliable.

Able to maintain strict confidentiality, especially around sensitive information.

Excellent interpersonal skills.

Self?motivated, able to work under pressure, and able to prioritise effectively.

A strong team player committed to organisational success.

Flexible, adaptable, and with a positive ‘can?do’ attitude.

Sympathy for Embrace’s mission within the Christian faith.

Comfortable working in a faith?inspired environment.

Desirable Criteria



Skills and Abilities



Experience using Beacon CRM.

Experience training non?technical staff in using a CRM.

Project management knowledge.

Ability to use reporting or analytics tools to produce reports from CRM data.

Experience using integration software (e.g., Make or Zapier) to connect systems.

HTML and SQL skills in a business environment.

Experience



Experience working in, or with, a charitable organisation.

Personal Qualities



Creative and innovative approach.

Employment details:



Job Title:



Systems Support Co-ordinator



Contract basis:



Fixed-term, Maternity Cover (20 hours over 3 days per week).



The contract will continue until the end of the maternity leave period.



Reporting to:



CRM & Systems Manager



Location:



Hybrid – remote/home working with the requirement to work at Embrace’s office in High Wycombe once every fortnight for team building purposes.



Hours of work:



Flexi-hours (see details below)



Annual Salary: £15,986.30 + £312 working from home allowance (total part-time salary, £16,298.30 per annum). This is based on full-time equivalent of £29,175.





Benefits at Embrace the Middle East:





• To support every member of staff to work as effectively as possible, Embrace offers remote and flexible working arrangements. This includes flexi-time and home-working arrangements.



• Embrace’s flexi-time framework means that staff can vary, by agreement with their manager, their start and finish times, taking into account the needs of their work and personal preference/circumstance. Staff are required to start work between 7:30am – 10:00am and finish between 3:00pm – 6:00pm. Our core collaborative working hours are between 10:00am to 3:00pm.



• Pension – option to join from day 1. Maximum employer contribution of 10%



• Holiday – 32 days, days made up of 24 personal leave days (including 1 day off for staff’s birthday) and 8 recognised public/bank holidays – rising to 33 days after 5 years’ service and 34 days after 10 years’ service, plus 3 days leave between Christmas and the New Year



• Reimbursement of pre-agreed travel expenses.



• Access to retail discount portal.



• Life Assurance – 3x salary.



• Employee Assistance Programme (confidential counselling, legal and financial advice) – available 24 /7, 365 days a year



• Training and development programme for all employees.



• Commitment to staff health & wellbeing.



Probationary period: 3 months

title: Phone Research Assistant - Call Landscaping Companies in Phoenix (75-125 calls)
description:
I'm conducting market research on artificial turf installation business in the Phoenix, Arizona metro area and need a VA to make 80-100 phone calls to local turf/landscaping companies.



Your role: Call companies and inquire about services and pricing. Through natural conversation, you'll gather key information about each company (availability, pricing, licensing, service area). This is NOT sales — you're simply having conversations and collecting data.

Note: Some companies on the list are suppliers (sell turf but don't install). For those, you'll just ask about material pricing and move on quickly.



What You'll Be Doing:

Task 1: Customer Inquiry Calls (80-100 calls)



- Call artificial turf companies from a list I'll provide

- First, determine if they do installations or are just a supplier

For INSTALLERS: Ask about availability, pricing, service area, and licensing as a customer would

For SUPPLIERS: Quick call to get material pricing, then move on

- Log all responses in a Google Sheet I'll provide

- Flag high-priority companies based on criteria I'll give you



Task 2: Subcontractor Outreach (15-20 contacts)

- Search Craigslist,
 Groups, and Indeed for independent turf installers in Phoenix

- Reach out to see if they're interested in subcontract work

- Gather info on their experience, equipment, insurance, and rates

- Log everything in a separate sheet



Deliverables:

- Completed Google Sheet with data from all calls

- Priority list of top 10-15 companies worth following up with

- List of 10-15 potential subcontractors



Project Details:

- Total calls/contacts:
Estimated hours: 20-25 hours

- Timeline: Complete within 7-10 days of starting

- Working style: Independent — I'll provide detailed scripts and briefing docs, you execute



What I'll Provide:

- List of companies to call with phone numbers

- Detailed briefing document

- Call scripts and suggested phrases (not word-for-word, just guidance)

- Google Sheet template for logging everything

- Support via text/phone if you have questions



Ideal Candidate:

- Clear, natural English speaking voice (slight accent is fine)

- Experience with phone-based research or cold calling

- Comfortable having casual conversations (not robotic script-reading)

- Reliable, organized, and detail-oriented

- Available to work during US business hours (Arizona is MST, no daylight saving)



To Apply:

Please answer these questions in your proposal:



1. Have you done phone-based research or cold calling before? Are you familiar with Google Sheets? Briefly describe.

2. Are you comfortable posing as a customer to gather information?

3. What hours are you available in Arizona time (PST)?

4. Record a 30-second voice memo introducing yourself (upload to Google Drive or Loom and share the link) — I want to hear how you sound on the phone.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Claude AI Expert for Ad Research & High-Converting Recruiting Ads (Life Insurance Niche)
description:
Overview



I’m a life insurance agent scaling a team by recruiting high-ticket sales professionals (setters & closers).



I’m looking for a Claude Code expert who can combine:



AI-powered research

Marketing strategy

Ad creative development



Your role is to identify, analyze, and replicate winning ads—then turn them into high-converting recruiting ads tailored to my niche.



This is NOT a basic VA role. I’m looking for someone who can think, analyze, and build systems.



What You’ll Be Doing

Use Claude (with code capabilities) to:

Research ads across platforms (Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google)

Analyze large volumes of ads and extract patterns

Break down winning ads into:

Hooks

Messaging

Offers

Emotional triggers

Identify what makes ads perform and why

Create:

Short-form video ad scripts (TikTok / Reels style)

Written ad copy

Multiple hook variations for testing

Continuously improve ads based on findings and performance

Requirements (MUST HAVE)

Strong experience using Claude AI with code capabilities

You understand how to use Claude beyond basic prompting

You can analyze, structure, and extract insights from data

Strong understanding of:

Direct response marketing

High-converting ad creatives

Ability to:

Think critically and identify patterns (not just generate content)

Strong English writing skills

BONUS (Highly Preferred)

Experience with:

Meta Ads Library / TikTok Creative Center

Recruiting ads or high-ticket sales ads

Insurance, finance, or opportunity-based marketing

Experience with n8n (or similar tools like Zapier / Make)

Ability to build workflows that automate ad research and analysis

Basic coding or scripting experience (Python, APIs, scraping tools)

Experience building repeatable AI + automation systems

Compensation

Competitive (based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses tied to ad results

Opportunity for long-term growth

To Apply



Please include ALL of the following:



Examples of your work (ads, copy, or AI workflows)

How you would use Claude Code to find and analyze winning ads

Share one ad you think is currently “winning” and explain why



Who This Is Perfect For



Someone who:



Knows how to use AI as a research and analysis engine

Can combine technical skills + marketing thinking

Enjoys reverse-engineering what makes ads work

Wants to build systems—not just complete tasks



If you understand both AI systems AND marketing psychology, this role is for you.

title: MEDIA BUYER — In-house · Full-time · Remote
description:
**Who We Are**



Rogier's Ecom Fzco is a fast-moving direct-to-consumer e-commerce company operating multiple brands across Europe, the US, and beyond. We run paid media at scale across Meta, Google, and Pinterest — and we're building the team that keeps us scaling.



We don't do slow. We test fast, kill fast, and scale what wins.



---



**The Role**



We're hiring a Media Buyer to own performance across our brand portfolio. You're not just managing budgets. You're making daily decisions that directly impact revenue — killing what bleeds, scaling what wins, and staying two steps ahead of the market at all times.



You sit at the center of the operation. Creative, launching, retention — everything flows through you.



---



**What You'll Do**



Daily



- Kill bad ads draining failing campaigns

- Scale winning campaigns ? send action message to team

- Review previous day test results ? send clear pass/fail verdict

- Approve only high-performing creatives before anything goes live

- Confirm launcher checklist is complete

- Keep CRM clean — no killed status without winner tag

- Maintain full overview of what's working across all brands ? generate new ideas



Weekly



- Monday — Prep Tuesday meeting: funnel ideas, winning ad review, unprofitable fixes, KPI check

- Wednesday — Prep Friday meeting: what worked, what didn't, new angles

- Thursday — Full CMO report + winner tagging + hold team accountable on KPIs

- Saturday — Scale priorities + best sellers check across Meta, Google, Pinterest, Taboola

- 2–5 new ad-set concepts tested per winning product

- Google scaling review ? send completion message

- Oversee
 & SMS campaign launches with retention manager



---



**What We're Looking For**



Must-haves



- Minimum 2 years running paid media for DTC e-commerce brands

- Proven Meta Ads experience — testing, scaling, and managing budgets profitably

- Google Shopping experience — feed management, scaling, exclusions

- You understand unit economics — ROAS, margins, and contribution profit

- Fluent English — written and spoken

- Experience working inside a fast-paced remote team



Character



- You make decisions fast and own them

- You think in systems — not one-off fixes

- You hold yourself and your team accountable without being asked

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Coachable but confident — you push back when you have a better answer



---



**This Is NOT For You If:**



- You need someone to tell you what to do every day

- You don't understand e-commerce margins and unit economics

- You can't handle managing multiple brands simultaneously

- You avoid accountability

- You think media buying is just pressing buttons



---



**What You Get**



- $2,500/month — fully remote

- Direct impact on a multi-brand portfolio scaling across Europe and the US

- Work with a lean, high-performance team where results are rewarded

- Fast career growth — this role has a direct line to CMO responsibilities

title: Capcut/Tik-Tok Editor
description:
Editing VA hiring post:



Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcup or the video editing software of your choice.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head w/ overlays - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.







Talking head with green/screeen overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video. And also being able to green screen my talking content to be used as an overlay









B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.









You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Can turn around assignments within a 24 hour time frame

Able to work 6-7 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as mostly consistent)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$300/month + bonuses for 2-3h a day MAX and potential full time work in the future with a 

salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create this reference video:



Reference video: 



Google drive: 



Video Instructions







Please complete the following steps:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

WATCH THE LOOM

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video

description:
Hey,



I'm hiring 3 new staff members for the team. We configure HubSpot for agencies, which means we have multiple projects on at once. We are expanding our fractional delivery service and are growing rapidly.



I need someone to come in so that when I provide the LLD and documentation, they can come in and just execute from day one. You'll be in charge of delivering the configurations - if you have experience with N8N and can speak to your previous HubSpot builds will be a massive bonus.



Looking to hire for this role full-time. You'll need to work Australian Eastern Time Standard Business Hours. Ideally Thursday - Monday working hours.



The right staff member would be someone who will review the docs, advise us on what else we need and then complete the project's initial configurations within 2 days of work. 



Please let me know if this is something you're interested in as i'm looking to hire for these roles rapidly.



Best,

Nick

title: Paralegal/Attorney – Criminal Defense
description:
Position Overview:

We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Paralegal or Attorney to support our criminal defense practice. This role requires in-depth knowledge of criminal law, including motion preparation, legal research, and document management. The ideal candidate will be responsible for preparing motions, drafting legal documents, and ensuring compliance with legal procedures. They will work closely with attorneys to ensure the defense strategy is executed effectively, and help prepare cases for court. This is a remote position requiring exceptional written English, organizational skills, and a strong grasp of U.S. criminal law procedures fundamentals.



Key Responsibilities:

• Draft, review, and be prepared to file various legal documents including motions, briefs, and memoranda.

• Prepare appendices for motions, including organizing exhibits, declarations, and supporting documentation.

• Prepare the table of contents for legal filings, ensuring accuracy and compliance with court rules.

• Conduct in-depth legal research on complex criminal law issues and generate a research summary for the attorney.

• Analyze discovery materials to identify critical issues and inconsistencies.

• Prepare memoranda and case summaries to aid in litigation strategy.

• Assist in the preparation of motions for hearings, trials, and appeals, including motions to suppress evidence, dismiss charges, or modify bail.

• Manage case files, ensuring all relevant documents and evidence are properly documented and stored.

• Prepare discovery responses, subpoenas, and other legal documents as directed.

• Coordinate with clients, witnesses, and experts to gather information and evidence for cases.

• Maintain communication with the court, opposing counsel, and clients regarding motions, hearings, and court dates.

• Provide support during trial preparation, including organizing exhibits, trial briefs, and witness lists.

• Ensure all legal documents comply with applicable state and federal rules and deadlines.



Qualifications:

• Paralegal Certificate or Law Degree (JD) required.

• Proven experience in criminal defense law, specifically in motion practice.

• Strong knowledge of court rules, procedures, and legal writing standards.

• Experience preparing appendices, tables of contents, and organizing large case files.

• Excellent research, analytical, and writing skills.

• Ability to manage multiple cases and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong communication skills and attention to detail.

• Experience with legal research tools (e.g.,Lexis/Nexis and Westlaw) and document management software, such as Clio CRM software.



Preferred:

• Prior experience in criminal defense law or litigation.

• Knowledge of specific motions in criminal defense, including motions to suppress, dismiss, and motions for bond 

        reductions.

• Familiarity with Nevada local court rules and procedures in criminal defense.



Application Process:

Interested candidates should submit the following:

• An updated resume.

• A cover letter detailing your experience with U.S. criminal law and Clio software.

• Two writing samples (legal motions or briefs preferred) with how long it required the applicant to finalize the presented 

        document (in hours) from the time the assignment was given to the document presented.

title: Social Media Manger/ Content Creator
description:
Job Title: Creative Marketing Director / Social Media Manager 

Employment Type: Remote, month-to-month (potential for long-term after 90 days probation)

Company: Harvest Health MD / Her Affirmed Life



Harvest Health MD - www.HarvestHealthMD.com

Her Affirmed Life - www.HerAffirmedLife.com



Position Overview: We’re seeking a creative, data-driven marketing professional to lead our brands’ digital presence and community engagement. This role includes managing social media, planning content, coordinating live streams, supporting community events, and analyzing results to drive impact.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and self-directed, with a strong sense of integrity and accountability in all work. They communicate thoughtfully and clearly, meeting deadlines with promptness, while maintaining careful attention to detail in every project. They’ll take a human-guided, evidence-based approach, balancing creativity with verified research and data rather than relying solely on automation and artificial intelligence. Most importantly, they live a life of work-life integration, managing responsibilities efficiently while maintaining wellbeing.



Key Responsibilities:

Master Brand Voice and Brand Stories.

Develop, implement, and manage brand strategy and social media content in alignment with marketing best practices and data and analytics.

Drive local brand recognition and online presence by identifying the most important marketing KPIs and developing content to achieve these goals.

Provide recommendations on brand-appropriate content needed for reels/stories.

Maintain Testimonials and Authority Database.

Maintain online reputation and presence while engaging with social media followers and subscribers.

Research, apply for, and develop new opportunities to promote Brand (i.e speaking, podcasts, and awards). 



Qualifications:

Proven experience in social media management and digital marketing

Skilled in analytics and data-driven decision making

Experience managing live streams and community events

Strong written and verbal communication with creative storytelling

Ability to maintain brand consistency across platforms

Self-motivated, dependable, and adaptable in a remote environment



Benefits:

Fully Remote & Flexible Schedule

Collaborative and supportive team culture

Professional Growth Opportunities – Access mentorship, training, and leadership development

Well-being-centered culture with healthy work-life integration

Performance-based bonuses for exceeding goals

Meaningful, mission-driven work

Long-term growth potential



Salary Range:

$3-7/hr



How to Apply:

Interested candidates are invited to complete the Pre-Interview Assessment and submit the following via the Google Form:

Cover letter and resume

OnlineJobsPH profile link

Portfolio



Google Form Link: https://forms.gle/FCpxX25jT4AX5NN69



Join our team and contribute to two purpose-driven brands—Harvest Health MD and Her Affirmed Life—where excellence, innovation, and compassionate, faith-centered care come together to transform lives. Be part of meaningful work that empowers both patients and women in their journey toward healing and wholeness.



Jamal Lawrence, MD

CEO / Founder

Harvest Health MD

title: Online Course Builder / Course Designer
description:
I’m launching an online mentorship program and looking for a Course Builder who can help organize and structure the course content.



I have the knowledge and will be recording all of the lessons myself, but I’m looking for someone who can help organize my ideas into a clear course structure, assist with curriculum organization, and build the course inside the platform.



This role will involve both curriculum organization and technical course setup.



**Responsibilities**



Curriculum Organization



* Help organize my knowledge into clear modules and lessons

* Assist with structuring a 6-week mentorship program

* Help turn rough notes or ideas into lesson outlines

* Suggest a logical learning flow for students



Course Setup



* Build the course structure inside the course platform

* Upload and organize lesson videos

* Add worksheets and resources

* Format lessons so they are easy to follow



Student Experience



* Ensure the course is structured clearly

* Create welcome sections and onboarding

* Test the student experience before launch



**Tools You May Work With**



* Online course platforms (Kajabi, Skool, Teachable, or similar)

* Google Docs / Google Drive

* Canva (for worksheets or simple downloads)



**Project Scope**



Course setup and curriculum organization for a mentorship program launching later this year.



Estimated project: **20–40 hours**



**Ideal Candidate**



* Experience building online courses

* Strong organizational skills

* Ability to help structure educational content

* Familiar with course platforms

* Comfortable collaborating to organize ideas



**Bonus Experience**



* Experience helping coaches or creators build courses

* Instructional design or curriculum planning experience

* Experience structuring mentorship programs



**To Apply**



Please include:



1. Course platforms you’ve worked with

2. Courses you’ve helped organize or build

3. How you typically structure a course curriculum

4. Your availability over the next few weeks

title: Influencer Outreach & Creator Partnerships VA
description:
Influencer Outreach & Creator Partnerships VA 

Remote (Philippines Preferred) | Full-Time



We are a growing ecommerce brand focused on premium coffee equipment, and we are looking for a highly organized and proactive VA to help us build and manage influencer and creator partnerships.



This role is critical to generating high-quality content and driving brand growth across social media and our Shopify store.



---



 WHAT YOU WILL DO



* Research influencers on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube

* Identify creators that align with our brand and target audience

* Send outreach messages via
 and direct messaging

* Follow up consistently to increase response rates

* Coordinate product collaborations and shipments

* Track creator deliverables (posts, videos, reviews)

* Collect and organize content from creators

* Maintain a structured influencer tracking system

* Support Shopify Collabs workflows (invites, tracking, coordination)



---



### WEEKLY TARGETS



* 60–80 creators researched

* 40–60 outreach messages sent

* Consistent follow-ups

* 3–5 creator collaborations progressing

* Creator content collected weekly



---



### TOOLS



**Required:**



* Instagram, TikTok, YouTube

* Google Sheets

* Outreach via
 and direct messaging

* Willingness to learn Shopify Collabs quickly



**Preferred:**



* Experience using Shopify Collabs

* Experience with influencer research or discovery tools

* Familiarity with creator tracking, affiliate links, or campaign reporting



---



### WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Strong communication and follow-up discipline

* Ability to manage multiple conversations and tasks at once

* Reliable and consistent execution

* Interest in ecommerce, social media, or influencer marketing



---



### COMPENSATION



$300–$400/month (full-time)

Compensation will be reviewed after six months based on performance and contribution to results



---



### TO APPLY



Please include:



* A short description of your influencer outreach experience

* How you would find coffee influencers with 10k–50k followers

* Your internet speed

* Your computer specifications



At the top of your application write:

**“Creator Outreach Specialist”**



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be reviewed.

title: Unity Developer (3D) – Mobile Game (Idle / Progression-Based)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an experienced Unity Developer (3D) to join our team at Growth Chain and help build a large-scale mobile game.



The project is a 3D idle / progression-based mobile game inspired by top-performing titles in the genre, with a strong focus on engaging gameplay loops, smooth progression systems, and mobile optimization.



You will play a key role in building the core systems of the game and working closely with a small, driven team to bring the project to life.



????Responsibilities:

-Develop and maintain core gameplay systems in Unity (3D)

-Implement mechanics similar to idle / progression-based games

-Optimize performance for mobile devices (iOS & Android)

-Collaborate with designers and artists to implement assets and features

-Debug, test, and improve overall game stability



????? Requirements:

-5+ years of experience with Unity (3D development)

-Strong understanding of low-poly workflows

-Experience building mobile games (iOS/Android)

-Solid knowledge of C#

-Experience implementing gameplay systems (movement, progression, UI, etc.)

-Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks

-Good English communication skills

-Strong sense of aesthetics and animation

-Experience with Blender and Photoshop is a plus

-You should have some sort of Mac, if you don't let us know



???? This Role Is Perfect For Someone Who:

-Wants long-term, stable work

-Is motivated to grow their income over time

-Enjoys building games from the ground up

-Takes ownership and works without constant supervision



????What It’s Like Working With Growth Chain:

We are a fast-growing team of young, driven builders focused on creating successful mobile games and scalable digital products. We currently have:



-500,000+ downloads across our apps

-70,000+ daily active users

-A team that values execution, ownership, and growth



If you are someone who wants to make money, build a real career, and maximize your potential, this is the kind of environment where you can do that.



During the interview process, you will also have the opportunity to:



-Speak directly with one of our current developers in the Philippines and learn about 

-Learn what it’s like working with our team

-Learn about how other developers have grown into larger roles, including revenue share or partnership opportunities with our company for other projects we have made.



????Compensation & Benefits



Starting Pay: $6.25/hour (~$1,000/month). Prove yourself and your skills.

Post-Launch Pay: $8.25/hour (immediate increase after game release)($1320/month)

Monthly Raises: +$0.25/hour every month (uncapped growth)

Work Schedule: 40 hours per week

Paid Sick Leave: After 6 months

Health Insurance: After 6 months

Revenue Share Opportunity: Potential to earn from future games



???? How to Apply



To apply, please include:



Your portfolio or previous Unity projects (playable builds preferred)

A short description of your experience with similar games

Your availability



Important: Include the phrase "LETS GAME" in your application so we know you read everything.

title: Social Medai VA
description:
Social Media Virtual Assistant | Flourish Wellness MR

We are seeking a dedicated, proactive and creative Virtual Assistant to support our social media presence, audience growth and engagement.

Flourish Wellness MR is a nervous system-focused wellness business (Spinal Flow, bodywork, cellular health). Our work is grounded, real, and deeply client-centred — and we’re looking for someone who can help bring this to life consistently online.

This role is centred around social media management and content creation, with scope to evolve into strategy and growth support as you become familiar with the business, brand voice, and audience.

There will also be some administrative and back-end support to help streamline daily operations.



 This role is for you if you:

Have a strong eye for clean, simple, on-brand content

Can take voice notes, rough ideas or past content and turn them into engaging posts, reels and captions

Are confident working independently and taking initiative

Have an interest in (or understanding of) wellness, nervous system work, or personal development

Can maintain a tone that is grounded, nurturing, clear and a little bit edgy

Are proactive in spotting opportunities for engagement, conversation and growth

Are open to growing into a more strategic role over time



Key Responsibilities

Social Media Strategy & Growth (evolving role):

Support and contribute to social media strategy aligned with Flourish Wellness

As you settle into the role, begin offering ideas to grow reach, engagement and audience connection

Identify trends, opportunities and ways to attract ideal clients

Social Media Management:

Collaborate on content creation (initially guided, with increasing independence over time)

Turn raw content (voice notes, bullet points, client stories) into engaging posts, reels and stories

Create graphics using Canva in line with brand style

Schedule posts across Instagram and

Engage with followers, respond to comments/DMs where appropriate, and flag potential leads

Look for conversation starters and opportunities to add value

Content Repurposing:

Rework existing content into reels, captions and stories to maximise reach and consistency

Admin & Reporting:

 management and support

Assist with newsletters (design, formatting and sending using provided content)

Track basic KPIs (engagement, reach, growth)

Support with client follow-ups, testimonials, bookings and payments (as needed)

Systems & Event Support:

Assist with platform setup (as required)

Set up event tickets (e.g. Humanitix) and support event communication workflows



 Required Technical Skills

Canva (essential)

Strong understanding of Instagram and

Experience scheduling and managing content

Confident written/spoken English

Familiarity with the following is beneficial:

Mailchimp (or similar
 platforms)

Acuity Scheduling (booking system)

Humanitix (or event platforms)



Preferred Experience

Experience growing a social media audience

Understanding of engagement strategies (especially for service-based businesses)

Experience in wellness, lifestyle or personal development brands

Customer service via
 and social media



Desired Soft Skills

Attention to detail

Proactive and self-directed

Clear, straightforward communicator

title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator
description:
# **Admin / Transaction Coordinator (ATC) – Curative Title Real Estate (Florida Market)**



## **Overview**



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company specializing in **curative title and probate-related transactions**. We acquire properties with title issues by working directly with property owners and heirs.



We are seeking a **detail-oriented Admin / Transaction Coordinator (ATC)** to manage files **after contracts are signed**, ensuring all documents are properly executed, tracked, and delivered to our probate attorney.



This role is a hybrid of:



* Transaction coordination

* Light probate support

* Document preparation

* Project management



This is **not a sales role**.



20 - 30 hours per week



---



## **Primary Objective**



Move signed deals from **contract ? executed documents ? attorney submission ? case tracking**, with zero errors and full visibility.



---



## **Key Responsibilities**



### **1. Seller & Heir Coordination**



* Communicate with sellers and heirs after agreements are signed

* Provide clear instructions for document signing

* Maintain a professional, respectful tone (many cases involve deceased family members)



---



### **2. Mobile Notary Coordination**



* Locate and schedule **local mobile notaries anywhere in the U.S.**



* Coordinate time, location, and document requirements



* Provide notary with:



  * Document package

  * Signing instructions

  * FedEx shipping label



* Send tracking links to sellers and monitor delivery



---



### **3. Document Preparation & Quality Control**



Prepare and review:



* Quitclaim Deeds

* Joinders

* Assignments of Interest

* Affidavits of Heirship

* ID verification (driver’s licenses)



Ensure:



* Names match exactly across all documents

* Proper vesting language

* No missing signatures, initials, or notary sections



---



### **4. Document Flow Management**



* Receive scanned documents from notary

* Review for completeness and accuracy

* Submit completed files to probate attorney

* Track original documents via FedEx



---



### **5. Case Tracking & Attorney Coordination**



* Maintain status of each deal (pipeline management)

* Communicate with probate attorney for updates

* Identify bottlenecks and follow up proactively

* Provide internal team with status updates



---



### **6. Data Entry & Research Support**



* Review obituaries and public records



* Identify possible heirs and ownership clues



* Check for:



  * Liens

  * Judgments

  * Ownership inconsistencies



* Update CRM / tracking sheets accurately



---



## **Required Skills & Experience**



### **Core Competencies**



* Extremely detail-oriented (zero-error mindset)

* Strong organizational and follow-through skills

* Excellent written and verbal English

* Ability to manage multiple files simultaneously



---



### **Technical Skills**



* Google Sheets / Excel (intermediate)

* Document handling (PDF editing, file organization)

* Familiarity with CRM systems (preferred)

* Comfortable using FedEx/UPS shipping tools



---



### **Relevant Experience (Preferred)**



* Transaction Coordinator (Real Estate)

* Title Company / Escrow Assistant

* Probate or Legal Assistant

* Virtual Assistant (real estate or legal support)



---



### **Industry Knowledge (Strongly Preferred)**



* Basic understanding of:



  * Probate process

  * Heirship / inheritance

  * Deeds and title transfers



---



## **DISC Profile – Ideal Candidate**



### **Target Profile: High C / Moderate S**



**Dominance (D): Low–Moderate (15–30%)**



* Not aggressive or pushy

* Patient and process-driven



**Influence (I): Moderate (20–40%)**



* Able to communicate clearly with sellers and heirs

* Builds trust without “selling”



**Steadiness (S): High (30–45%)**



* Consistent, reliable, calm under pressure

* Handles repetitive processes well



**Compliance (C): Very High (30–50%)**



* Precision-focused

* Follows structured processes

* Strong attention to detail



---



### **What This Role Is NOT Suited For**



* High-D, aggressive personalities (too fast, error-prone)

* High-I, talkative but disorganized candidates

* Creative types who dislike structured processes



---



## **Ideal Previous Roles (Top Fits)**



Candidates who have worked as:



1. **Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (U.S. market)**

2. **Title Company Processor / Escrow Assistant**

3. **Probate or Legal Administrative Assistant**

4. **Mortgage Processing Assistant**

5. **Document Control Specialist (high-compliance industries)**



---



## **Key Traits for Success**



* Obsessive attention to detail

* Strong follow-up habits (nothing falls through the cracks)

* Ability to think logically through ownership scenarios

* Comfortable working with sensitive family situations

* Process-oriented and checklist-driven



---



## **Performance Metrics**



* % of files completed without errors

* Turnaround time from contract ? signed documents

* Document rejection rate (attorney feedback)

* Number of files successfully moved to probate



---



## **Working Hours**



* Must overlap with U.S. business hours (Eastern Time preferred)



---



## **Why This Role Matters**



You will be the **central operator** ensuring deals actually close.

Without this role, signed contracts do not convert into revenue.



---



> To apply send an
 to 
 with the subject: Admin/Transaction Coordinator



Include:

>

> 1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

> 2. Your DISC profile (D % + I % + S % + C % = 100%) - 

> 3. A brief description of any experience with real estate or legal documents

title: Next Level YouTube Editor WANTED
description:
— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Our team culture is always supportive and encouraging, but you should also expect to be held to an exceptionally high standard because that’s how we become the best in the world at what we do (If you hate getting lots of revisions/feedback on your work, you won’t fit in here).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— YOUR KPIs —



Your performance will be graded using the following KPIs:



1 Good Audience Retention, which we’ll be able to measure and learn from through our YouTube analytics.



2 The number of revisions the videos you edit require before being finalised (the less, the better)



3 The number of hours it takes you to create a video (the less, the better)



— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D):






Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!

title: Senior Xero Bookkeeper / Finance Operator (AU Business)
description:
Senior Xero Bookkeeper / Finance Operator (AU Business | Full Ownership)



We are a fast-growing Australian healthcare business looking for a highly capable Xero expert to take full ownership of our finance function. This is not a basic bookkeeping role.



We need someone who can:



clean up and stabilise our Xero file

own day-to-day finance operations

ensure everything is accurate, up-to-date, and ready for our accountant



What you’ll be responsible for



Full ownership of Xero (reconciliations, accuracy, structure)

Cleaning up historical data and resolving discrepancies

Managing accounts payable and receivable

Payroll processing and ensuring compliance (AU)

Preparing BAS/IAS ready for lodgement

Supporting cashflow visibility and basic reporting

Working closely with our external accountant



What we’re looking for



You must:

Have strong Xero experience (non-negotiable)

Have worked with Australian businesses (BAS, payroll, super, payroll, compliance)

Be able to clean up messy accounts and fix issues independently

Be detail-obsessed — you notice discrepancies immediately

Be reliable, proactive, and able to work without constant direction



This role is NOT for you if:



You need step-by-step instructions

You’ve only done basic data entry

You don’t understand Australian compliance requirements

You avoid problem-solving or complex clean-up work



What success looks like



Clean, accurate Xero file

No outstanding reconciliation issues

Clear visibility of financial position

Accountant can step in seamlessly



Role structure



Initial 4-week full-time clean-up phase

Then transition into ongoing bookkeeping role (part-time or full-time depending on workload)



Compensation



Competitive hourly rate based on experience

Long-term opportunity for the right person



To apply



Please include:



A short Loom video (2–3 mins) answering:

A messy Xero file — where do you start?

How do you ensure accuracy in reconciliations?

Your experience with BAS / IAS preparation and super lodgment in Australia

Your hourly rate



Applications without an introductory video will not be considered.

MUSIC CAMPAIGN

FILM CAMPAIGN

Instagram, YouTube Shorts)

Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar)

the execution

Experience creating viral content yourself · Knowledge of current trends on Western TikTok /

Compensation

Rate is performance-based and can go higher or lower depending on

quality, consistency, and results. 

Strong performers will be rewarded.



We are looking for a long-term working relationship, not a one-off.



Selection process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a practical editing test: we will send you raw video material

and a brief set of instructions. You will independently create a short-form video from this footage

according to our guidelines. This test is how we evaluate your instinct, creativity, and ability to follow

direction – no lengthy interviews, just your work speaking for itself.



How to apply

2. At least 2–3 examples of your video editing work (links to YouTube, TikTok, Google Drive, etc.)

3. Your available hours per day and time zone

4. Your PC specs and which editing software you currently use



We are actively looking for young, hungry talent who genuinely understand social media and want to grow

with us. If you have the eye and the drive, we want to hear from you

title: Senior Make.com / n8n Automation Developer for AI Email + CRM + Slack System
description:
We are a reputation management company



We already have our outbound cold
 engine running. This role is for building the next layer: an AI-powered reply-handling and follow-up automation system for interested prospects.



This is not a beginner automation job.



I am looking for someone who can take a detailed build spec and turn it into a clean, reliable, production-ready system with minimal hand-holding.



Project Structure



This role is structured in 3 phases:



Phase 1: Fixed-Price Build



You will build the initial system based on an existing detailed specification.



Fixed project payment: 50,000 PHP



Phase 2: Paid Maintenance / Optimization



After launch, I want the same person to continue maintaining, improving, debugging, and optimizing the system as needed.



This will be a separate paid arrangement after the build is complete.



Phase 3: Long-Term Role



If you are strong, fast, reliable, and easy to work with, this can turn into an ongoing role building and maintaining additional automations across the business.



I do not want a one-off freelancer if I find the right person. I want someone who can become the go-to technical builder for future systems.



What You’ll Be Building



You will build an automation system that does things like:



Pull interested prospect replies from Instantly.ai

Fetch the full
 thread

Send thread context + business/review data to Claude

Route responses based on logic:

auto-send

hold for VA review in Slack

escalate to founder

Send replies through Instantly while preserving thread and sender persona

Send SMS follow-up after

Update GoHighLevel pipeline, tags, and custom fields

Trigger stage-specific follow-ups when a prospect goes cold

Create Slack approval workflows with approve / edit / reject actions

Support a phased rollout from semi-automated to more fully automated

Be structured cleanly so future automations can be added without rebuilding everything

Platforms / Skills Needed



You should already be experienced with most or all of these:




 and/or n8n

APIs / webhooks / HTTP requests

Claude / Anthropic API

Instantly.ai

GoHighLevel

Slack integrations

Router logic / parsing / error handling

CRM workflow automation

SMS integrations

Who This Is For



You are a fit if:



You are a real automation builder, not just a general VA

You have built multi-step systems with APIs, logic branches, and approval flows

You can think through edge cases before they become problems

You can move fast and still build cleanly

You communicate clearly

You can work independently

You know how to debug without getting lost

Who This Is NOT For



This is not for you if:



You only know basic Zapier-level automation

You need constant step-by-step technical guidance

You have never worked directly with APIs / webhooks / JSON / routing logic

You cannot explain how your systems work

You are slow to execute and slow to communicate

You disappear when something gets difficult

Speed Matters



This project needs to move quickly.



I care about clean execution, but speed is also important. I am looking for someone who can build with urgency, communicate blockers early, and keep 
ntum without sacrificing reliability.



I do not expect perfection on day 1. I do expect strong judgment, proactive communication, and steady progress.



If you are the type who drags projects out unnecessarily, this will not be a fit.



Timeline



I am looking for someone who can begin quickly and deliver the first working version fast.



A strong builder should be able to make meaningful progress immediately and get this built in a reasonable timeframe.



When you apply, tell me your realistic timeline to complete v1 properly.



Long-Term Opportunity



This is important:



If you perform well on this build, I want to keep working with you.



We have additional automation opportunities beyond this system. The right person can become the ongoing automation lead for the business through paid maintenance, upgrades, new workflows, and future builds.



To Apply



Do not send a generic application.



Start your application with:



READY TO BUILD



Then answer every question below carefully.



Applications that ignore instructions will not be considered.



Screening Questions

What is the most advanced automation system you have personally built? Explain the workflow clearly.

Which of these have you used directly: 
, n8n, Claude API, Instantly.ai, GoHighLevel, Slack API, SMS workflows?

Have you built approval-based workflows before where someone can approve, edit, or reject inside Slack or another interface? Explain.

How would you prevent duplicate webhook processing in a system like this?

If AI output fails parsing or returns bad structure, how would you handle that safely?

If you were building this project, what parts would you build first and why?

What part of this system is most likely to break if built poorly?

How would you structure this so future automations can be added without rebuilding the whole thing?

How fast could you realistically deliver a strong v1?

After launch, would you be open to a separate paid maintenance role plus future builds?

Send 2-3 examples, screenshots, Looms, or short explanations of similar work you have done.

What is your preferred setup for the build fee and then ongoing maintenance after launch?

Final Instruction



Write the word BLUEPRINT at the very end of your application.

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $800–1,100 USD/month (based on portfolio/skills)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week), Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver (PST) overlap for feedback



---



THE VISION



Prismiera - luxury jewelry.



We're going to be building cinematic para-social content on Instagram/TikTok, with flexibility to pivot formats based on what the platform is rewarding. Realistic, stylized, dark feminine aesthetic, mythology underneath, luxury fashion on the surface. Think if a high-end fashion editorial had lore and a storyline.



The content follows a simple rhythm: our heroine talks to camera like a real person — casual, smart, magnetic — then something cinematic happens that changes everything you just saw. The audience replays it.



We're hiring for taste first, artistry, cinematography, humor, and technical execution. We provide all AI tools and training if needed. You bring the instinct.



THE CONTENT MIX



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption.

25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end execution of viral formats and humor. The premise can be unhinged; the visuals never break luxury canon.

10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. The algorithmic wildcard.



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Cinematic skits.



NO: Generic CapCut presets. Generic motivational reels. Anything made in Canva.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Produce original IG Reels and TikToks — parasocial content into cinematic reveal

- Build cinematic skits around our AI personas using trending formats and dark humor

- Integrate AI-generated characters into edits so they feel like they belong in the scene, not pasted on top

- Learn and use frontier AI generation tools (we provide paid accounts + training if needed)

- Music-sync editing — cuts married to the beat, rhythm as a storytelling weapon

- Design for platform behavior — what gets saved on IG, what loops on TikTok

- Ramp from 3–5 pieces/week to 6–10 at steady state



REQUIREMENTS



- Portfolio that makes us stop scrolling — we're evaluating taste, creative vision, and editing execution as a package. All three matter.

- Music-sync editing instinct (AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits — any genre)

- Work that has atmospheric, cinematic depth — layered compositions, light/shadow awareness, visual storytelling that goes beyond straight cuts and generic Capcut presets. Whether you achieve this in After Effects, Premiere, DaVinci, or anything else doesn't matter. The output is everything.

- Strong English, clear async communication, reliable deadlines

- Coachable — takes direct feedback and iterates fast



BONUS (affects your rate): After Effects proficiency, AI generation experience (Kling, Veo, Seedream), color grading, typography, sound design



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run your editing software and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



THE DEAL



- Paid trial: $150/week standard. For candidates with strong existing signal, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 for a single deliverable.

- All AI tool subscriptions provided

- Creative ownership from day one — you define how a luxury brand looks on social

- Direct feedback on every edit

- Rate growth tied to capability growth

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon, with two more AI-native brands incubating behind it



COMPENSATION: $800–1,100 USD/month based on portfolio and skills. Editors with compositing ability and AI generation experience start higher. Bi-weekly payments after confirmed hire.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your favorite movie]

Use 7+ apply points.



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit that is aspirational, aesthetic, fashion-adjacent, or a skit showing platform-native instinct. The feeling and execution matters.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE music-driven edit. (Can overlap with #1.)



3. Portfolio link (optional). If you have a reel, channel, or portfolio beyond the two links above that you are proud of, drop it here!



4. The Two-Act Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given footage of our AI heroine sitting in a dimly lit restaurant, a dark atmospheric beat, and her voice talking casually about something she noticed about the people around her. Act 1 is the conversation. Act 2 is the cinematic reveal. Pitch both halves — what does she say, what does the audience see, and what is the reveal? Humorous? Epic?



5. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). Your experience with generative AI tools. If none, let us know.



6. Hardware. CPU / GPU / RAM / upload speed.



7. Turnaround. Given existing footage, potential music track, and an established template — how long for a 15–20s piece? How long for a 45s stitched cinematic AI video?



8. The Rewrite. Make this dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: Junior React Native Developer (Part-Time, Long-Term Growth Role)
description:
About Sprout Network



Sprout Network is a fast-growing mobile app focused on building a large-scale digital ecosystem with long-term blockchain ambitions. We are currently focused on strengthening and expanding our live mobile application while continuing development toward future infrastructure goals.



Our app currently has:

We are looking for a junior developer who wants to grow long-term with the company. This is not a short-term freelance gig. This is a growth position with clear pay increases based on performance and independence.



Position Details



Role: Junior React Native Developer

Type: Part-Time

Hours: 25 hours per week

Schedule: 5 hours per day, Monday – Thursday

Time Zone Requirement: Must work within 5:00 AM – 1:00 PM EST

(Your exact 5-hour shift will be chosen within this window upon hiring)



This role has strong potential to become full-time in the future.



We hold:



A start-of-week meeting every Monday



An end-of-week meeting every Thursday



Clear communication and reliability are extremely important.



Compensation



Starting Pay: $5.25 per hour



100 hours per month



$525 per month to start



Paid biweekly



Once you are able to independently work inside the app without heavy supervision:



Your pay increases to $7.00 per hour



After that, you receive a $0.25 raise every month



There is no salary cap. This position rewards developers who prove themselves and stay long term.



If you are looking for a stable growth plan where performance directly increases your income, this is for you.



What You’ll Be Working On



You will work directly with our lead developer and assist with:



Feature development in a live production app



Bug fixes and edge case handling



Improving UI components



Supporting earning logic and timer systems



Assisting with referral logic and data consistency



Helping maintain ad flow integrations



Supporting internal tools when needed



Tech Stack

Mobile



React Native



Expo



Firebase (Auth, Firestore)



Google & Apple Sign-In



AdMob (rewarded ads + banner flows)



Web / Internal Tools



Next.js



Tailwind CSS



General



Git / GitHub



Clean component architecture



Clear error handling



Proper state management



Required Skills



React Native (Expo experience required)



Firebase (Firestore + Auth)



Ability to work inside an existing codebase



Git version control



Solid English communication (clear updates and explanations)



Ability to follow direction and collaborate with a lead developer



Who This Is For



This is for someone who:



Wants long-term stability



Wants raises based on real performance



Is coachable and eager to grow



Takes pride in writing clean code



Wants to work on an app with real scale



We care more about your willingness to grow and communicate clearly than being a senior expert.



How To Apply



Please include:



Links to your GitHub or React Native projects



A short explanation of your experience with Firebase



Confirmation that you can work within the required EST time range



Your internet speed (upload and download)



The word “SproutGrowth” in your application subject line



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed

description:
We run a growing home care company focused on helping seniors live safely and independently in their own homes. Our business depends on consistent, measurable results—not trends, not vanity metrics.



We are hiring a full-time SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to work directly with our internal team.

You will be part of our long-term operation and expected to execute, improve, and take ownership of results.

What You Will Own



Your primary responsibility is simple:



???? Increase qualified inbound phone calls and inquiries

Website Management & Optimization



Update and improve website content (WordPress or similar)
